Generates {Shield:BaseValue}+{Shield:MAtkPer} Protection upon herself with her willpower.
Smashes his hammer down with all his might, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to all enemies within {SplashRangeSum} block(s) nearby.
Smashes his hammer down with all his might, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to all enemies within {SplashRangeX}{X}{SplashRangeY} range nearby.
Smites enemies with his shield, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage and stunning all enemies within {SplashRangeX} horizontal range in front of him for {StunTime} sec.
Smites enemies with his shield, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage and stunning all enemies within {SplashRangeX}{X}{SplashRangeSum} range in front of him for {StunTime} sec.
Unleashes a piercing aura with his sword, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to all enemies in a straight line within {SplashRangeX} horizontal block(s) in front of him.
Deals {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to the target and all enemies within {SplashRangeX}{X}{SplashRangeY} range near the target, freezing them for {StunTime} sec.
Deals {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to the target and all enemies within {SplashRangeSum} block(s) near the target, freezing them for {StunTime} sec.
Fires a powerful bullet at the target, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage.
Heals himself and all allies within {SplashRangeX}{X}{SplashRangeY} range nearby by {Heal:MAtkPer}.
Unleashes the boiling rage within himself, increasing Attack Speed by ({AttackSpeedPer:BaseValue}+{AttackSpeedPer:MAtkPer})% for {Time} sec.
Breathes out flame, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to all enemies within {SplashRangeSum} block(s) in front of him {AttackCount} time(s).
Restores MP of all allies within {RangeX}{X}{RangeY} range nearby by {ManaHeal:BaseValue}+{ManaHeal:MAtkPer}.
Ambushes the target from their back, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage.
Transform into a werewolf increasing his HP by <color=#00ff00>200%</color> and ATK by (<color=#00ff00>125%</color>).
Summon Sha-sha the Golem with <color=#00ff00>150%</color> HP and <color=#00ff00>150%</color> ATK and mount on it.
Draws out the vitality of nature, healing Sha-sha by {Heal:BaseValue}+{Heal:MAtkPer}.
Discharges streaks of lightning that bounce between enemies {Bolt} time(s), dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage.

Launches a wave that hits the nearest target. The wave hits both enemy and ally back and forth {Chain+1} times, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to the enemy and healing the ally by the same amount.

Strikes the Holy Blade down, dealing {10215@Damage:BaseValue}+{10215@Damage:MAtkPer} damage to the straight line in front, then attacks with the Holy Blade for {Time} sec. Holy Blade's ATK increases by (<color=#ffcc00>125</color>+{10210@Damage:AtkPer:MAtkPer})%.
Bombie throws bombs from his bag to random targets with {AttackSpeedPer}% increased Attack Speed for {Time:BaseValue}+{Time:MAtkPer} sec.
Evokes an earthquake, dealing {Damage:MAtkPer} damage and stunning all enemies within 5x5 range nearby.
Ambushes the target from their back, dealing {Damage:MAtkPer} damage.
Deals {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to the target and all enemies within {SplashRangeX}{X}{SplashRangeY} range near the target, freezing them for {StunTime} sec.
Deals {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to the target and all enemies within {SplashRangeSum} block(s) near the target, freezing them for {StunTime} sec.

Unleashes the power of the Most High for {Time} sec, gaining 100% Spell HP Drain and dealing spell normal damage to all enemies within {20440@SplashRangeSum} block(s) instead of inflicting normal attacks.
Becomes enraged from attacks, increasing Attack Speed by {AttackSpeedPer}% and becoming immune to crowd controls.
Grab and pull the farthest target and stun the target for {StunTime} sec.
Outraged Magra leaps to the farthest enemy, dealing {Damage:MAtkPer} damage to the enemies and stunning them for {StunTime} sec.
Pushes back nearby enemies by 3 blocks toward the direction one is facing.
Terrorize nearest enemy, disorienting the enemy for 2 sec. The terrorized enemy will flee.
Shortly after the start of the battle, fades into the shadow and reappears behind the farthest target, sweeping all nearby enemies with a sickle.
Eldritch orders its knights to charge, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to all enemies on the field and pushing them back.
Gargoyle creates a storm, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to the area in front.
Absorbs {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} HP from the target {AttackCount} time(s).
Bewitch a target into attacking their own allies for {CharmTime} sec.
Transforms into an invincible swarm of bats for {TransformTime} sec and drains HP of all nearby enemies.

With the power of Vampire lord, absorbs <color=#FFD247>10%</color> HP from all nearby enemies every second. At fixed intervals, scatters the collected blood, dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to the nearby area.
Deals {Damage:MAtkPer} damage and stuns the target for {StunTime} sec.
Swings the bat, dealing {Damage:MAtkPer} damage and stunning the target in {RangeX} block(s) in front for {StunTime} sec.
Evokes an earthquake, dealing {Damage:MAtkPer} damage and stunning all enemies within 7x7 range nearby.
Raises the shield to generate {Shield:BaseValue}+{Shield:MAtkPer} Protection.
Doubles the Attack Speed for {Time} sec.
Swings its fist, dealing {Damage:MAtkPer} damage, and flings the target back by 5 blocks.
Shoot 3 arrows on the next normal attack.
Power of the lord of Elves
Becomes immune to crowd controls with the power of the Elven Lord.
Swing the spear to attack all nearby enemies.
Shoot 3 targets at the same time.
Pushes back nearby enemies by {Knockback} blocks toward the direction one is facing.
+2 sec Stun effect on <Judgement of Light>
Recover 100% of MP at the start of the battle
Converts 25% of exceeded healing from <Radiance of Life> to Protection
Drain +50% of the Spell Power damage as HP
Recover 90% of MP at the start of the battle
-30 MP Cost of <Summon Golem> and <Vitality of Nature>
Grants Protection equal to 100% of Spell Power upon himself and the targeted ally of <Reckless Protection>
Up to 2 waves of <Calm and Stormy> can be on the battlefield at the same time.
+2 sec Stun effect on enemies hit by the shockwave of <Holy Blade Garna>
Deals additional 50% of normal attack damage to enemies within 3x3 range of the target
Deals additional spell normal damage equal to 100% of Spell Power to the target while casting <Rain of Bombs>
Shelda always stands against enemies at the front line of the battlefield to honor her father, a legendary war hero.
Daniel, the Captain of the Paladins, led numerous battles against the monsters. His old friend Alberon claims to have used half of his mana to heal him.

Leonhardt, the former Captain of Emperor's Royal Guard, joined the mercenaries to keep the northern monsters at bay after his retirement. As a seasoned warrior, he acts as an adviser for young warriors.
Evan, a talented swordman and tactician, ascended to the position of Knight Commander at such a tender age.
Priya, one of the most naturally talented elven mages, aims to become a true mage. She intends to learn from the world itself, rather than the mages of her own kind.
Aramis the Hawk Eye never misses a target, no matter how far it is, thanks to the sharpshooting technique that he honed from a young age.
Born with incredible Most High power, Alberon was raised to become a priest of the Holy Church. However, he never wanted to be a priest and is bitter about helping people.
Zuo Yun is a member of the King's Royal Unit, which consists of only those who mastered the martial arts of the Eastern Kingdom. No one is a match for his skills, even within the Unit.
Born between a dragon and a human, Draco cannot wield the full power of a dragon, but his might is still quite formidable.
Bardrey, who admires the beauty of the world, travels from place to place and sings in a heavenly voice. Bardrey's songs are famous for soothing people's minds.

Mara lost her hometown in an invasion led by Southern forces. She gathered those who had burning hatred in their heart and formed a brutal gang of bandits. Now she is seeking ruthless revenge as their leader.
Hansi, who was born and raised in a small village in the Eastern Kingdom with Zuo Yun, is a guardian who has defeated several monster invasions and is an archer with incredible marksmanship.
Lyca is a werebeast who is cursed to take a form of a beast and has been forsaken by the human world. He is searching for the being that cursed his kind.

Jol is known as the Elf's strongest swordsman, but he wants more. He believes that he has to seek out those who are stronger than him and grow by challenging them to reclaim long past glory of the Elves.
Born in the forest, Sha-Sha used to be a little earth spirit in the form of golem small enough to sit on Lily's head. It has grown so big that Lily can mount on it.
Zupitere, a noble from the Southern Empire, was born with lightning in her hand. She can perfectly control her Mana now, but when she was young... Well, it's a long story.
Born in a village of shamans, Asiaq communicates and comforts the dead, but shows no mercy to evil spirits.
The enemies who have experienced the overwhelming power of Behemus, blasting everything in his way with two giant shields, lose heart, just by looking at his black armor.
Although Yeon lost her sight when she was young after being severely wounded during a monster invasion, she can see everything by feeling the waves and the currents of nature.

Being left at the southern outskirts with only a sword as a child, Mel began her journey to the North in search of her past as soon as she came of age. As she overcame all the challenges she encountered in the name of justice, Mel became known as the wandering hero.
Bombie, who had shown great talent in dealing with explosives since childhood, played a great role in stopping the demons with the Northern mercenaries.
Evan the Blade of the Empire
Shelda, who led countless battles to victory, is now called a Celestial Guardian. For her followers, her shield is a symbol of invincibility.
Daniel became the smiting hammer for the enemies of the Holy Church. His set of cold steel armor matches his stern face, and he shows no mercy to those who violate the church's creed.

Daniel, a blacksmith blessed by the Most High, wields a hammer embracing the light. His hammer is fearsome for his enemies during the battle; however, it is reliable to his fellows' weapons and armor after the battle, giving ally troops endless reassurance.
Leonhardt, who was called the Lion Heart, overwhelms the enemy with his unbreakable spirit, no matter how many enemies there are or how brutal the battle might be.
Evan's reputation reached the Emperor's ears, and he was then made an Imperial Knight. Now he is the Blade of the Empire that defeats anyone who stands in his way.
Evan is obsessed with bloodthirst and looking for his new victim to wield his bloody sword, leaving justice and honor behind. His sword radiates a bloody red aura everywhere in hunger.
After spending almost a lifetime to understand the truth of mana, there is no one else more deserving of the title of Archmage than Priya.
The sharp ice spear penetrates enemies, and a swirling frost storm stops the whole world.
Since joining the resistance against the Empire, Aramis has become the worst nightmare to the Empire's forces.
Alberon spent his whole life following the teachings of the Holy Church and now preaches about faith as a priest and a crucial member of the Church.
Impressed by a knight’s pride during his journey, Zuo Yun has decided to join them. Now he wields his spear with the honor and arts of the Eastern Kingdom.
- On heaven and earth, I alone am honored - 天上天下 唯我獨尊
Draco honed his wildness and strength in a dangerous northern forest teeming with evil creatures. His ruthless flame annihilates every living soul that steps into his domain.
Bardrey wants to test if her music can make kings and nobles, who are surrounded by the most amazing entertainment, dance. She hopes to discover rare instruments and melodies on her journeys.

Mara was raised by a poor hunter who was a retired war veteran. After her hometown was engulfed in the flames of war, she had to learn to protect herself and wield a sword to survive in the wilderness.

Mara happened to get a necklace with black color while looting a wagon. the necklace emitted constant dark energy even after being moved to her camp, and the bandits became increasingly imbued with madness.
Hansi borrowed the power of the Most High and the Holy Church to protect the village. Now she is a guardian of the people and a Watcher for the Holy Church.

Deep inside Lyca's heart, a hatred for humans who ostracized him still burns. His flaming rage turns into madness when he transforms into his wolf form. When that happens, no one, not even Lyca himself, can control him.

Jol has conquered the Eternal Forest on the Western reach of the continent and now marches to dominate who oppose him all in his shining armor. His sword is glowing with the power of the Most High, and it shall shake all humans and the monsters of the North.
Jol, who was revered as the next monarch, touched a forbidden force for the revival of the Elves. Wounds from his sword were no longer recovered, and nothing was left where his army pass through.

When spring comes to the west Eternal Forest, fairies change their clothes and celebrate the season of birth. Lily also prays for the blooming of the forest with Shasha. May the darkness of the North permeate the Eternal Forest next spring.

To learn more powerful magic, Zupitere went to the Mage Guild, located between the West and the South. She showed her overwhelming talent among the elves and human cadets. Zupitere is expected to become a archmage in the future.

Zupitere, a genius from birth, despises the incompetent. On the battlefield, she electrocuted her frail enemies countless times and laughed at them. That's why she is called a devil with the face of a girl.

People of Asiaq's hometown in the northeast have been hunting demons for their life, but also hunted by them. As the power of the demons grew stronger, Asiaq enhanced the power of the wildness. Her cold gaze always stares at the horizon.
Instead of a black iron shields symbolizing the power and honor of the empire, Behemus jumps toward the battlefield with a pure white shields that protect others and confronts evil.
The coast at the end of the Eastern continent, where the Yeon grew up, was far from the world. But everything has changed since her village was attacked by the demons.
Mel has solved many requests and destroyed many evil beings. Everyone praises her name, but she still wields a sword for someone somewhere.
Bombie, who has learned how to deal with poison following explosives, addicts the enemies with his special poison bomb made with his talents.

Magical Dust that can be obtained by dismantling Relics.

A great sword that symbolized the power of the Empire. Black Steel from the Empire is well known for its formidable strength that makes all other steel throughout the entire continent pale in comparison.
An armor given to Knights of the kingdom. It is regarded as an honorable mark of the knights who serve the kingdom and its people, and to receive it as a reward is the highest honor.

A bow used by the elves of the Eternal Forest.
Without the blessing of the Forest, one could not even pull its string.
A staff crafted from trees that endured the harsh environment of the Frozen Land. It boasts enormous mana with the incredible power of Nature.
A horn that warns about castle invasions. It helps defenders respond as quick as possible.
A treasure made for the greedy Goblin King. Many crowns were made from stolen gold, but none of them were to the Goblin King's liking.
A diary that records the journeys of a renowned adventurer. The incredible amount of expedition notes ushered in the Age of Expedition.
A holy object that contains hero's starlight. It strengthens the body and the mind of those who gaze upon its light.
A hammer that emits extreme heat and light. Ores refined by the glorious energy of the hammer are said to be transformed.
A razor-sharp blade in bloody red. The wielder will be engulfed with madness, compelled by the bloodthirsty sword's whispers.
A helm filled with holy power of ancient guardian. The wearer will be blessed by its power and be granted incredible strength like that of a giant.
The holder will gain indescribable mana with just a touch, but it corrupts the holder, leading them onto a path of self-destruction.
A golden ring stained with dark desire. Those who are attracted by the whispers of the ring gain great wealth, but are cursed with insatiable greed.
The contract of mercenaries who are not bound by the any region. A full refund will be made when the contract is terminated.
An insignia that can only be worn by Imperial elite troops. Their enemies can feel their own death just by looking at it on the battlefield.
A banner that brings militias together. Anyone can be stronger if they fight together—even ordinary villagers.
A bunch of swords that look exactly the same. There is no one who can predict these rapid blades dancing.
A iron helm that brings strength to the body and mind The wearer never kneels with an indomitable will.
A shield that is optimized to parry attacks It can serve as a game-changer in battles through a counterattack.
A very long sharp spear. This spear allows a preemptive strike outside enemy range.

You can view the tutorial again in the settings.
You can <color=#FFC13D>summon</color> heroes by tapping the Summon button.
Our heroes will <color=#FFC13D>attack enemies automatically</color> when the battle begins.
MP <color=#FFC13D>is charged</color> every time the hero <color=#FFC13D>attacks or gets attacked</color>.
Once MP is fully charged, the hero casts <color=#FFC13D>their own unique skills</color>.
By successfully defending against invasions, you may obtain <color=#FFC13D>Silver</color>.
You can check out the <color=#FFC13D>Silver and Reward</color> for each round here.
Let's <color=#FFC13D>summon heroes</color> with our remaining Silver.
Troop size represents the <color=#FFC13D>max number of heroes you can deploy on the battlefield</color>. Currently, you can have <color=#FFc13d>up to 3 heroes</color> in the Troop.

<color=#FFC13D>Drag and recruit</color> Heroes. While recruiting Heroes, you can check their <color=#ff2222>Attack Range</color> and <color=#49f>Skill Range</color>.
<color=#FFC13D>Finish recruiting the Heroes</color> to start the battle.
You have enough Silver <color=#FFC13D>to expand your Troop</color>.
<color=#FFC13D>Drag on the screen to scout the enemies</color>.
Enemies with equipment are more powerful. <color=#FFC13D>We can claim their equipment after you defeat the enemies</color>.
You can <color=#FFC13D>Merge the same heroes</color> to upgrade the <color=#1cc>Hero's Tier</color>. <color=#bbb>(Drag or Double Tab)</color>
We do not have enough room in our Troop to utilize the remaining heroes.

<color=#FFC13D>Drag a hero down to dismiss them.</color>
When using "Dismiss All," heroes of tier 4 or lower are dismissed all at once.
Whoa, <color=#f22>an Elite Enemy has appeared!</color> Elite enemies appear<color=#FFC13D> every 5 rounds</color>.
Arrange your Troops and equipment efficiently based on the info you got from the briefing.
Use Silver wisely and <color=#FFC13D>Win</color> the last battle with your strategy!
This is the Barracks. You can find <color=#FFC13D>recruited heroes</color> and manage their <color=#FFC13D>level and EXP</color> here.
Great job! Heroes can be rearranged in the Barracks tab <color=#FFC13D>anytime</color>.
You can always <color=#FFC13D>retrieve embers from the Altar you upgraded to invest them in other Altars</color>.
<color=#FFC13D>Gate tab is where you can initiate the battle</color>. We have to defend our castle against Goblins right now.
<color=#FFC13D>You can begin the battle with Heroes and Altars you chose by tapping the Battle button</color>
<color=#FFC13D>Upgrade Heroes and Altars, and lead us to victory!</color>
<color=#FFC13D>Challenge mode</color> will be unlocked if you successfully defend the Chapter.
In the Challenge mode, you'll face <color=#FFC13D>more formidable enemies</color>, but you may obtain <color=#FFC13D>more rewards as return</color>.

You will receive <color=#2df>extra rewards</color> if you clear the Chapter/challenge for the first time. <color=#FFC13D>Aim for that rewards</color>. <size=23><color=#ccc>(Scroll can be used at Shop.)</color></size>
Once you successfully defend a Chapter, <color=FFC13D>next Chapter</color> will be unlocked. Touch this button <color=#FFC13D>to select the Chapter you want to proceed</color>.
Select the desired chapter and challenge phase and successfully defend against the invasion. <color=#FFC13D>Good luck!</color>
A specific Chapter will be selected for <color=#FFC13D>Arena Formation</color> every season. It is comprised of <color=#FFC13D>5 rounds</color> as a condensed version of a Normal Chapter.
You will join Arena with <color=#ffc13d>5 Troops you set before each round</color>, so please set your Troop carefully for every round.

Now, please continue with <color=#ffc13d><Create Arena Troop></color>.
<color=#bbb><size=25>You can't retreat while creating your Arena Troop. Please confirm your Heroes and Altars.</size></color>

Your <color=#ffc13d><Arena Troop></color> has been set!
We are ready to join <color=#ffc13d><Arena></color>now.
Your <Arena Troop> will carry out <color=#ffc13d>10 battles</color>. After you finished Arena battle 10 times, <color=#ffc13d>you will have to recreate your <Arena Troop></color> to continue.

If you want to <color=#ffc13d>reset</color> the Troop before completing 10 battles, please <color=#ffc13d>Retry</color> the Arena Invasion.
But make a careful decision as there is a <color=#ff4d4d>retrial penalty</color>.

Tap the <color=#ffc13d>Battle button</color> and participate <color=#ffc13d> <Arena></color> to take the first step closer to victory.
<color=#ffc13d>Good Luck!</color>
You have to be at least Level 7 to use a Relic
We have to enhance our Troops with <color=#ffc13d>Relic</color>to defeat those powerful enemies.

You can <color=#ffc13d>craft</color> relics using <color=#ffc13d>Relic Pieces</color> at the <color=#ffc13d>Blacksmith</color>. You can also <color=#ffc13d>combine, forge, and dismantle</color> Relics.
To craft a single Relic, we should combine <color=#ffc13d>3 of the same Relic Pieces</color>, or reinforce <color=#ffc13d>1 Relic Piece</color> with <color=#ffc13d>Magical Dust</color>

Try it with this <color=#ffc13d>Magical Dust</color>.
Please continue by tapping <color=#ffc13d>Craft</color>.
<color=#ffc13d>You can equip the Relic by dragging and dropping it in the Relic slot</color>.
There are <color=#ffc13d>various types of Relics</color> you can acquire in King God Castle. <color=#ffc13d>Please use the relics to your strategic advantages to defeat the corrupted enemies</color>.
Book of EXP rewarded for your Rank
Try out Arena Formation and create your Troop.

Coming from the north where the Blue Moon rises, Luniare endlessly yearned for the Moon that rose every night, coming to harness its beauty to bless others.

Alberon knows well that doing good deeds is not the only way to honor the Most High's will. To defeat the evil that he has defined, he took off his robe and headed to the battlefield with his companions.
Luniare's hometown is cold enough for the sea to be frozen, but every summer, the warm sunlight shines upon the beach. Her tribe holds a summer festival to celebrate precious days.
Gloves that collect power from many stars. Each star possesses a unique power.

When Bardrey plays her lyre, those who listen are calmed and soothed from their rage, becoming peaceful. She is deemed as a guardian angel who protects the world without taking arms.
Behemus hunted the monsters that even made him afraid, taking their shapes. Adorned with black horns, Behemus now charges ferociously like a wild beast.

Everyone in the continent knows the story of Rossette knocking down an Ogre with just a single swing of her giant axe. She is the only one in the Imperial Elite who can wield a steel axe with one hand.
Rossette leaps into the air to strike, dealing ({Damage:MAtkPer} + {MaxHpRatioAtk:BaseValue}% of the target's Max HP) damage (max damage {MaxDamage}).
Aramis the Musketeer of the Empire
Aramis has a history of infiltrating the Imperial Army during his days in the resistance. He still never missed any shots, but they were often not fatal.
Every now and then, Asiaq calls upon the spirits and spends her time with them. Her closest friend, Fox Spirit, taught her to hunt and to be cautious.
A censer filled with spiritual energy. Enemies that smell the burning scent become confused and vulnerable to attacks.

There is an equal chance to summon unowned Heroes.
There are no laws at sea. You find only my waves and your life.

When it is the season of the sky becoming clear again, the southern village of the Empire holds a sea fishing festival. Rossette enters the contest with just a spear and not a fishing rod, but she wins a prize every year.

Shelda expected to win with a 'sizable' lobster she caught at the fishing festival held in the coastal village during summer. But when she came to the stage, a giant shark and huge crab left her speechless.

Leonhardt participates in the fishing festival every year and always makes a bet with Rossette, his subordinate in the Imperial elite troop, to see who catches a bigger fish. In the last festival he attended, he surprised everyone with a huge crab that nobody had ever seen before.
Some follow their instinct and some follow their reason. Some are good and some are bad. Yet it does not matter for Cain and his blades. His deathly circus took many lives like a desert gust.

Cain became a ruthless slayer after acquiring bladeclaws from an evil beast of the northeastern desert. To his deathly circus is now added a tenacity of a predator.

Lyca was imprisoned in a frost prison in the depths of the north after going berserk and destroying several villages. The northern chill couldn't cool down Lyca's rage, but it did give him back cold reasoning.

Hansi was bestowed with a magical bow made by an ancient artisan elf for her exceptional service in the defense against monsters at the eastern front. This bow, which contains the essence of wind magic, gathers and sharpens air to shoot it like an arrow.

During the blazing hot summer, miners would go to the beach to relieve their fatigue from hard labor. Bombie brings local specialties to pay for his explosives. From time to time, some of his products are said to leave explosive tastes in your mouth.

Chung Ah is the heir of the family that serves the Azure Dragon, one of the guardians of the Eastern Kingdom. She has inherited the power of the dragon and was raised as a skilled warrior. She sweeps the battlefield with the power of the Azure Dragon and her Crescent Moon Blade that was passed down to her.

When black mana stains the atmosphere, there comes a time when it won't rain for several months even in the verdant Eternal Forest. Sha-sha stores water from the Spring of Vitality and goes on a journey with Lily to help the withered beings in the forest.

Draco, a half-dragon and half-human, could use the power of an adult dragon at a much younger age than a pure dragon. As he pursued destructive power, his flame was concentrated and enveloped in blue mana, becoming even hotter than before.

Taesan was born as the third son in the Mount White Tiger clan known to be the pillar of all martial arts. After years of training to surpass his limits, he finally defeated the Great Tiger of the mountain and descended to the secular world in search of his lost brothers.

Mount White Tiger is a shrine for White Tiger, one of the Four Divine Creatures. It is also known as the birthplace and sacred location of numerous martial arts. Neria is the leader of a secret sect called Red Moon, a group that seeks the root of the Curse of the Black Blood that spread throughout the world. After losing her kin to the cursed ones, she lives to eliminate the dark-blooded beings to the last of their kind.

Shoots {RemoveBuffAfterAttackCount} enhanced arrows that deal ({DamageForDesc:AtkPer:BaseValue}+{10355@Damage:AtkPer:MAtkPer})% of ATK. During <Annihilation Time>, Neria's Attack Speed is fixed to {AtkSpeedByBaseAtkSpeedPer}% and her Range limit is lifted.

To find the cursed ones hiding in all quarters of the continent, Neria maintains a close relationship with the empire that rules over the largest territory. In return for her help, she acquires information on her enemies such as their hideouts and weaknesses.

The Crescent Moon may be the darkest of all Moons, but it will soon become bright. May the New Moon blesses you who will shine the night as the Full Moon.
As the Queen of Eldor, I officially appoint you as the Warrior of Eldor!
Not letting anyone pass here—that is my purpose.
I wish you peace and tranquility forevermore.
Nice to meet you, recruit. I am Mel, a royal guardian knight.
Huh? You can't be here! Humans shall not set foot in the Elven Kingdom! What? A test to become the Warrior? There are still people attempting that?
I fight with my sword. You won't be able to use magic from now on, so you better be prepared. Well then, let's see if you can put up against the energy of my sword.
+1.25 sec of stun duration time on the first two concentrated waves of <Wave Catcher>
Recover 50% of MP at the beginning of the battle

Haerang is the head of the family that reveres the Black Turtle. He is also the leader of the families in the east that worship the Four Divine Creatures. Although the Eastern Kingdom has relatively low military power, Haerang's presence as the Sage of the East Sea is enough to daunt the enemies from invading the kingdom.
Sends concentrated waves that deal {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage and stun for {StunTime} sec {AttackCount} time(s), starting with the nearest enemy.
The waves ripple to the left and right of the target of <Wave Catcher>, dealing damage to the enemies hit and stunning them. The damage and the stun duration are 30% of the original skill.

Although Haerang seems to show no interest in the secular world, at times, he would be gone like the winds and reappear at all corners of the continent to find out the state of affairs. Thus, he is well-informed about the matters of the continent while living in the far east.

Attention, all units. I am Knight Commander Aslyn. We are here to conquer this ancient tower that is protected by the spirits of the previous knights and their monarch. Yet do not despair, for the Miracle will strengthen our forces.

The <color=#FFCA3B>Tower of Trials</color> is the great <color=#FFCA3B>Crusader King Eldin's sanctuary</color>. The king founded the order of knights and ended the war, uniting the central region.
Eldin and his crusaders had been protecting this tower from the monsters of the north for a long time, thanks to the <color=#FFCA3B>powerful Miracles</color>.
After Eldin passed away, Queen Eldritch ascended the throne. Having grown lax by the peace brought by the former king, the queen and the nobles of the royal family lost the impregnable sanctuary to the <color=#FFCA3B>sudden invasion from the north</color>.
Angered by the royal family who had failed to protect the tower and desiring to protect the central region, the <color=#FFCA3B>crusader king and the heroes of the past returned to the tower</color>.
The heroes and even the monsters who had attacked them in the past now became specters and <color=#FFCA3B>stop those who climb the tower</color>, controlled by the enraged spirit of the old king.
Although countless monsters and humans challenged the tower in search of royal treasures and the sacred power of Miracles, it remains protected by the awakened crusader king and <color=#FFCA3B>his formidable trials</color>.
-- And today, <color=#FFCA3B>the current Knight Commander Aslyn</color> who was once a powerful crusader and fought alongside Eldin, has summoned heroes from all over the continent.
With the help of Aslyn who can use the powerful Miracles of the old crusaders, you must reclaim the tower and let the crusader king and the heroes of the past rest in eternal peace.

- On each floor of the Tower of Trials, <color=#FFCA3B>Monarch Eldin's formidable trial</color> awaits you.
- However, Knight Commander Aslyn who used to be a Knight Captain can <color=#FFCA3B>use one of the powerful Miracles that was once wielded by the former knights</color>.
- Assist Knight Commander Aslyn to clear all floors with your <color=#FFCA3B>two Troops</color>.
- You can earn more rewards if you <color=#FFCA3B>clear the floors without being defeated</color>.

Gidnil is one of the most fierce protectors of the Holy Church, always acting in accordance with the creed. He does not approve of Daniel who might not prioritize the creed and act on his own accord.
Gidnil the Gauntlet of the Empire

As a knight of the Holy Church and a citizen of the Empire, there are times when Gidnil would fight in wars as part of the Imperial Army. The black imperial armor he wears instead of the white armor of the Holy Church clearly shows what he is: a natural-born soldier.

It's an invasion from the north! About time we remind them the land belongs to us. Bring me my hammer!

At times, slimes that get lost would find themselves in the depths of Mirsyl's forest. Although she strongly rejects any outsiders, she became good friends with the slimes who had no ill intent. Now she protects the forest with them.

Agathe fought with all of her might against the undead army that ambushed the members of the Holy Church. She managed to evacuate everyone but ultimately fell in the battle. And then... a new durahan rose from the battleground after a while.
A pair of sturdy and light combat boots worn by the vanguards. It enables the wearer to run fast and gain momentum thanks to the mana imbued in it.

When you fight monsters, you should be careful not to become one. Yet Chung Ah willingly damned herself to fight the mighty void. Now, the Azure Dragon tainted by the void energy sweeps the battlefield.
You can obtain heroes and hero EXP.

Just like Asiaq, Kanak can talk to the spirits of the dead and sense their emotions. The only difference is that unlike Asiaq, who dwelled in the village of shamans that comforted souls, Kanak was born deep in the north, a war zone of endless bloodshed.
The dark side of Kanak will never let go of its rage and sorrow even in the bone-chilling cold. With the Frost Tribe’s piercing fury, Kanak rips into his target’s soul.

Cain, who drinks the blood of his enemies amidst the dark silence, might as well be the vampire of vampires. The difference from his human form is that only barren death remains on his path, without a single drop of blood to be found.

Ren’s younger sibling, Rie, might have a lot in common with her older sister, but she also has a lot of differences. She likes silence and will use her abilities to eradicate anything that bothers her.

Summons up to {MaxSummonCount} doll(s) and makes them charge at enemies to deal {10400@Damage:MAtkPer} damage. The dolls deal {SummonUnitAtkForDesc} spell damage on normal attacks, and all damage dealt by the dolls is calculated as Rie's damage.
Deals damage equal to 100% of Spell Power to all enemies within 3X3 range when a doll is destroyed.

Ren may as well be the coldest person to others, but she shows the warmest love for her little sister. She always dresses Rie in bright clothes and wishes her to be in the light instead of the darkness.
Charges at the enemy that Rie is attacking to deal {Damage:MAtkPer} damage. All of the dolls' stats follow Rie's stats at the time of their summoning.

You feel a roar that permeates the Great Rift in chaos...
You feel tens of thousands of glares beaming at you...
You feel an enormous force weighing down on your entire body...

"...The vast darkness that shrouded the sky devoured everything there was." "The Great Rift," that’s what people called it. Farmers sowing seeds, merchants selling goods, heroes charging out into the battlefield, and even monsters... All it took was a split second for a piece of this world to be sucked into the pitch-black swirl. What remained was nothingness, and there the Great Rift planted unspeakable creatures of the void. They spewed dark energies that decayed and corrupted everything in their path, and it wasn’t long until the entire continent was devastated. But there was one hero that remained unscarred by the Great Rift. Now, that hero is stepping out on a journey. To rescue the friends and companions that had vanished into the rift, and to find a way to put an end to this disaster, the hero seeks to enter the Great Rift. -- The Great Rift made sporadic appearances for millennia, swallowing pieces of this world to send them to the otherworldly space that was in its embrace. Here in the Great Rift, time flows differently, and you may encounter lost technologies, archaic magic and runes, and the disasters of ancient times. Your hero must search the maze-like paths of the Great Rift to rescue companions, equip weapons, and obtain divine powers through relics. And at the end of the rift, there might be a way to shut it down once and for all.

As the second son of the White Tiger clan, Taebaek is also the second oldest brother of Taesan. To prove that his martial art is second to none, Taebaek travels from one continent to another to challenge the dojos of the most renowned fighters.

Provokes {MaxTargetCount} nearest enemies for <color=#ffcc00>4</color> sec and deals a total of {10426@Damage:MAtkPer} damage to {10425@SplashRangeX}{X}{10425@SplashRangeY} range. After <color=#ffcc00>4</color> sec, deals damage equal to ({10426@Damage:MAtkPer} + {10426@DamagePerByDamagedSumDuringChanneling}% of damage taken) to the same range.

When <White Tiger Kick> ends, emits a shockwave of 3 horizontal blocks in 4 directions. Deals damage equal to Spell Power to enemies hit and reduces their Attack Speed and Movement Speed by 20% for 3 sec.

Taebaek is indeed aggressive and in love with fights, but his expertise is no other than the art of patient retaliation. Though he might look a bit careless, he has trained his body for years to withstand the attacks of his enemies until he can land his 'final comeback.'

Cathy is a bounty hunter who belongs to a group of mercenaries. Her clients criticize her for being too greedy, but they have no choice but to hire her because of her unparalleled skills. Her specialty is extermination.

Fires a powerful bullet at the final hit of <Dancing Bullet> that deals damage equal to 500/625/750/900% of ATK.

Cathy has no regard for events that don't bring her huge profits, but for reasons unknown, she would sometimes show up to major incidents all over the continent. Not only that, she would sometimes become a mercenary and join a side to fight in wars.

Baldir has resided in the Eternal Forest for eons, a time beyond the imagination of any living being. Neither hospitable nor hostile to all lives, he seeks to do nothing but coexist.

When placed at the front row (front 2 rows), transforms into <color=#ffcc00>Nature's Fury</color> form with <color=#00ff00>250%</color> HP. When placed at the back row (back 2 rows), transforms into <color=#00bbff>Eternal Wisdom</color> form with <color=#00ff00>50%</color> Attack Speed and <color=#00ff00>200%</color> increased Spell Power.

The skill of <Eternal Wisdom> form generates a mark on the target. When another Baldir in <Nature's Fury> form attacks a marked enemy with a normal attack, Baldir in <Nature's Fury> form heals 25% of Max HP and Baldir in <Eternal Wisdom> form deals extra spell damage equal to 75% of its Spell Power.

The time of Baldir's birth and the nature of his existence is a sheer mystery. He used to appear in a new form in blistering winters, preventing the spark of life from fading away by reviving the dying plants.

We meet again, King of the Castle. I am Commander Aslyn. We have recently fended off the invasion of the enemy and recovered the Dominion we once lost.
I shall aid the recovery of your desolated Dominion.
You do not have any Buildings in your Dominion. You can select an empty site and construct various buildings.
First, you must build a Chamber as a focal point to manage your Dominion.
Constructions require costs to be paid. My headquarters will aid you with the payment for this construction.
Select the site and construct the Chamber. (You can change the location of the building whenever you want after construction.)
Your Dominion is fundamentally run by the Vitality that your heroes produce. Therefore, you must build an Inn to work as a storage for their Vitality.
Select the site and construct an Inn. (You can change the location of the building whenever you want after construction.)
You can assign heroes in each building to boost its efficiency. Various effects are applied according to the levels and classes of heroes.

Your Dominion also has many other buildings you can construct aside from the Chamber and Inn. I recommend you develop your Dominion in a unique way to enjoy various effects and expand the supply for your battles.
Good luck!

Victoria grew up as a knight in Revalant, a castle in the central region famous for horses and horsemanship. Once she came of age to ride horses, she met her favorite horse 'Whiterun' and swore an oath to fight together in battles and treat her horse like a family, following the traditions of Revalant.

Upon reaching the target, Victoria dismounts from her horse and inflicts normal attacks that deal damage equal to {10520@Damage:AtkPer:BaseValue}% of ATK within <color=#8DFFFF>3x4</color> blocks in front of her.

Revalant is not the biggest city in the central region. However, inside its walls is the combination of the continent's best horses in the central plains and the time-honored horsemanship, allowing Revalant to own a formidable cavalry, each soldier with the might to face one hundred enemies.

Aenrath was the watcher of the forest even long before the birth of the current Elven Prince. As fearful as he was of the darkness from the abyss that would reach the elves someday, Aenrath was also fascinated enough to study it. Like many who had fallen to become monsters after fighting so fiercely against them, the abyss tainted Aenrath's heart. One day, he vanished, leaving countless dead bodies of Elven watchers and a shard of a broken sword behind him.

Aenrath, known as the disciple of silence, stood as the captain of the watchers for centuries and protected the Eternal Forest long before Tia rose to his rank. When he dwelled among his folk, those who set foot into the forest disappeared without a trace, and a shade shrouded the Elves and the Eternal Forest for years to come.

Mana was always abundant around the guardian stone that protected the deepest parts of the Eternal Forest for a long time. One day, a spirit that loved the forest united with the Guardian Stone and the land around it in hopes of cherishing and protecting the forest. This spirit now guards the forest along with many other spirit friends.

Recalls all Stone Spirits that Elizabeth summoned, then deals {10550@Damage:BaseValue}+{10550@Damage:MAtkPer} damage to all enemies within {10550@SplashRangeX}{X}{10550@SplashRangeY} range near the Stone Spirits and stuns them for {10550@StunTime} sec. Centuries ago, a girl stumbled into the Eternal Forest. When she was weeping after losing her way, a giant spirit dwelling in the forest took notice of her. The countless flowers that covered the spirit's body captivated the girl, and so she followed the spirit who safely guided her out of the forest. To show her gratitude, the girl gifted the spirit 'Elizabeth,' a doll she cherished.

Farael used to cause worries even among the elves, as he could not wield his mana properly despite his overflowing motivation. One day, he ran into Mel and her party, who had happened to visit the Elven Kingdom. Determined to prove his worth, he departed from the Eternal Forest with them.

Farael was born with an unfathomable amount of mana. Others expected him to grow up to be a great mage, but he failed to meet such expectations as he could not properly wield his overflowing mana upon reaching maturity. Had it not been for a being who cared for Farael to keep his spirits high, he might have even gone as far as to forgo the art of magic.

Garam was born into a family of royal guards of the Eastern King. Despite the decline in their influence due to the downfall of the royal household, many still acknowledge the skills that are passed down for generations within her family.

Upon taking damage, has a {Unit@MissRatio}% chance of evading. Successful evasion negates damage and crowd controls and also grants {Unit@AddTechniqueAtMiss} TP. When TP is full, charges at the target to deal {Damage:MAtkPer} spell damage, then inflicts {10585@AttackCount} normal attack(s) with damage equal to {10585@TickDamage:AtkPer:BaseValue}% of her ATK.
Upon evading, has a 50% chance of dealing normal attack with damage equal to 70% of her ATK to the target that attacked.

After the Eastern royal household fell and power was seized by the families of the Four Divine Creatures, Garam's family dutifully operated in the shadows, gathering information and amassing resources. While their plans remain unknown, it's certain that they will not hesitate to take action when the moment arises.

Though Dandelyn is the youngest of all blacksmiths of the northern Six Peaks, she is also the most talented. Using the earth as her anvil to create masterpieces, the sound of her hammer reverberates throughout the entire mountain range.

Upon dealing normal attack to enemies whose final Attack Speed has been reduced by the earthquake, removes the final Attack Speed debuff and deals additional damage equal to 200% of Spell Power, stunning them for 1 sec (applied once every 3 sec to the same target)

Dandelyn had to give up her dreams of becoming a miner like her father Gerbel when she nearly brought down the entire mine with a single swing of her pickax. Luckily, her grandfather recognized her potential as a blacksmith and decided to take her in as his apprentice.

The Empire's chest armor is forged with the highest quality black iron, which is no exception for ordinary soldiers.
No knight has missed the stage of the training sword.
At the Mage Guild of the Empire, staves are researched as thoroughly as magic itself.
Trainees of the Phoenix family have swung wooden swords countless times to hone their rapid swordsmanship.
The totem of the Winter Lake Tribe brings peace to all nearby.
Orcs prove their power by hunting down powerful beasts and taking their molars as trophies.
The ones called the Shadows of the Empire are after you? How unfortunate... Best of luck to you.
Survival was never an option when the dragon became the target of Ragnir, the second brother of Orsali.
Knights of the Central Region practice their skills to pierce through the weak spots in between the joints of solid armor.
The grand beat of the drum that echoed throughout the mountains of the East mustered courage even within the hearts of those who had lost all hope.
The armor worn by elf warriors is imbued with magic that amplifies the effects of protection and favorable spells.

Many of those who constitute the army of the Central Region are commoners who do not possess remarkable strength. However, they rally under the knights' banner, upholding the dignified mission to protect their region, and will not hesitate to fight for honor and glory along with the knights.
The hammer infused with the power of light, wielded by the Southern Paladins, bring down punishment upon enemies and heals allies.
A manual of tactics essential for novice mercenaries. Although it contains a variety of seasoned strategies, it repeatedly focuses on the importance of adhering to the basics.

The first Elven King bestowed powerful swords and bows imbued with the force of the Eternal Forest upon the Watcher Captain of the Royal Guard. However, only the pieces of the sword's blade remained after Aenrath shattered it by Aenrath; Tia, the succeeding captain, inherited the bow.

The House of Juniper is known for its beautiful swordsmanship, resembling a dance of blooming flowers as their swords and steps blend to become one. When Ren grew to display her swordsmanship for her family, the sword blade passed down for generations was reforged into a weapon customized for her, as was the case for all those in her lineage who had followed the same path.

A holy relic created by Eldin and his paladins to combat the power of the abyss during the Great Holy War. Only those who possess the power and purity untainted by darkness may draw out the mystical power within the scroll.
Though the bearer of Mur suffered a stream of strife and war against countless enemies of formidable strength, the black shield and the indomitable will prevailed.

Among the Black Turtle's five holy objects, the Orb of Water has the power to manifest the inner image of others in the form of water. Most tide masters barely reach the level of creating such images, but Yeon's ingenious skills allow her to maintain their forms while communing with their inner selves at the same time.

When the void consumes our inner focus, the abyss may peer into us, forcing us to the verge of frustration and collapse through excruciating visions that let us behold nothing but despair. However, if we keep our eyes fixed on the light of hope amid the darkness, we will be able to blind the eyes of the abyss and defeat it.
A bloodstained orb that absorbs and emanates blood from its surroundings. The might of this blood, which governs the essence of all life, is grotesque yet magnificent.

HP is reduced according to the value displayed after being hit. When HP is depleted, the hero stays defeated during that battle. HP is determined based on various factors, such as the hero's type, base HP according to the level, tier, and HP ratio.
ATK affects the damage of normal attacks and skills with ATK ratios. ATK is determined based on various factors, such as the hero's type, base ATK according to the level, tier, and ATK ratio.

Spell Power affects the damage of skills with Spell Power ratios, the size of applied buffs, duration, and others. Spell Power is determined based on various factors, such as the hero's type, base Spell Power according to the level, tier, and Spell Power ratio.

Attack Speed affects the interval between normal attacks. It is determined based on various factors, such as the base Attack Speed according to the hero's type and Attack Speed ratio. Every time a hero's tier increases by one, their Attack Speed increases by 10%.

Range indicates the distance reached by normal attacks. It also affects some skills that are influenced by its distance. Range is determined based on the hero's type. The cross shape shows that the hero's range is limited to the indicated number of blocks vertically and horizontally from the hero's position. The grid shape shows that the hero's range reaches anywhere within the area according to the indicated number. If a hero is dragged without dropping, the normal attack range is displayed in red, and the skill attack range is displayed in blue.

Movement Speed refers to the distance that can be traveled within a time frame. It is determined based on the type of the hero and can be increased or reduced by various factors, such as Relics and skill effects.

HP Drain is the ability to restore a set percentage of the damage dealt as the HP of the hero. If it is specified as Physical/Spell, it applies to the corresponding damage type when restoring the HP. If nothing is specified, it applies to both physical and spell damage.

Physical DEF reduces physical damage received by 100 * [Physical DEF] / (900 + [Physical DEF])%. Spell DEF reduces spell damage instead of physical damage. If nothing is specified, the DEF stat will provide both Physical and Spell DEF by the indicated value.

Damage dealt increases or reduces the damage according to the specified value. Conditions may apply to increase or reduce the damage dealt, which affects either the hero or the damage itself. When multiple factors influence the damage dealt, the damage is adjusted accordingly after the factors are summed up.

Damage taken increases or reduces the damage according to the specified value. Conditions may apply to increase or reduce the damage dealt, which affects either the hero or the damage itself. When multiple factors influence the damage taken, the damage is adjusted accordingly after the factors are multiplied by each other.

Skill amplification increases or reduces skill damage and the damage derived from such damage according to the specified value. Conditions may apply to determining skill amplification, which affects either the hero or the damage itself. When multiple factors influence skill amplification, the damage is adjusted accordingly after the factors are summed up.

Normal attack amplification increases or reduces normal attack damage and the damage derived from such damage according to the specified value. Conditions may apply to determining normal attack amplification, which affects either the hero or the damage itself. When multiple factors influence normal attack amplification, the damage is adjusted accordingly after the factors are summed up.

EVA grants a chance for attacks to be completely missed when a hero takes damage. If an attack misses, the hero negates all damage along with any accompanying status effects from the attack. The maximum chance to miss is limited to 80%.
Greetings, King of Humans. I am the Prophetess of the Eternal Forest, <color=#ffc13d>Luminesera</color>.
The forces of darkness still exist in this world. To defeat them, you must be able to wield the treasures scattered across the world, known as <color=#ffc13d>Legacies</color>.
You can obtain Legacies only through <color=#ffc13d>Legacy Summon</color>, which requires Gems.
Allow me to offer some assistance regarding your <color=#ffc13d>first summoning</color> for the sake of our future.
The <color=#ffc13d>Barracks</color> will lead you to all the Legacies you have obtained.
Please, <color=#ffc13d>select a hero</color> who will receive the Legacy.
You can equip Legacies by <color=#ffc13d>tapping the Legacy slot</color> on the hero's details page.
The power of the Legacy has been bestowed upon your hero.

King of Humans.
Continue to summon and gather the various Legacies from around the world to enhance your heroes and <color=#ffc13d>defeat the darkness</color>.

I see that you are already exploring the corrupted Memories of Eternity. There, you will be able to obtain various <color=#ffc13d>Accessories</color> crafted by a wide range of races.

<color=#ffc13d>Select the Accessory slot for equipment</color>. There are <color=#ffc13d>4 types of Accessories, and any type can be equipped in the omni slot</color>.

King of Humans.
The darkness looms stronger and hides within Memories of Eternity. <color=#ffc13d>You must set forth with your heroes and reach its end.</color>

MP is a resource consumed to use skills upon reaching the maximum. It is determined based on the type of the hero and their potential ability. Heroes gain 15 MP when performing normal attacks, and MP is affected by the equipment options and their potential abilities. MP is also recovered when receiving damage, based on the Max HP and the value of the damage taken. MP recovery is affected by other factors as well, such as equipment options and potential abilities.

Physical CRIT hits occur during physical attacks at a rate equal to the Physical CRIT Chance, increasing the damage by (25 + [Physical CRIT damage])%. If the physical/spell condition is not specified, the CRIT stat will apply to both Physical and Spell CRIT Chance and damage.

Spell CRIT hits occur during spell attacks at a rate equal to the Spell CRIT Chance, increasing the damage by (25 + [Spell CRIT damage])%. If the physical/spell condition is not specified, the CRIT stat will apply to both Physical and Spell CRIT Chance and damage.

Menace reduces the DEF of the target dealt damage by the equipped hero for 1.5 seconds. The reduced value is in proportion to the equipped hero's tier (x1 for tiers 1-2, x2 for tiers 3-4, x3 for tiers 5-6, x4 for tier 7). Even if multiple units influence the effect, only the highest DEF reduction value will be applied. The Menace value can be increased or reduced by equipment, accessories, and other factors. Besides its base effect, the Menace value can affect the performance of Legacies, Accessories, and others related to the Menace stat.

Guard increases the DEF of the target that received beneficial effects, such as recovery, Protection gain, and stat increase from the equipped hero for 5 seconds. The increased value is in proportion to the equipped hero's tier (x1 for tiers 1-2, x2 for tiers 3-4, x3 for tiers 5-6, x4 for tier 7). Even if multiple units influence the effect, only the highest DEF increase value will be applied. The Guard value can be increased or reduced by equipment, accessories, and other factors. Besides its base effect, the Guard value can affect the performance of Legacies, Accessories, and others related to the Guard stat.

Guard increases the DEF of an ally besides the user that received beneficial effects, such as recovery, Protection gain, and stat increase from the equipped hero for 5 seconds. The increased value is in proportion to the equipped hero's tier (x1 for tiers 1-2, x2 for tiers 3-4, x3 for tiers 5-6, x4 for tier 7). Even if multiple units influence the effect, only the highest DEF increase value will be applied. The Guard value can be increased or reduced by equipment, accessories, and other factors. Besides its base effect, the Guard value can affect the performance of Legacies, Accessories, and others related to the Guard stat.

Special damage is increased or reduced according to its relevant value. Special damage refers to any white damage derived from physical or spell damage. The amount of special damage is in proportion to the physical or spell damage that was originally dealt. Effects that increase special damage can be obtained from Accessory options and set effects. When multiple factors influence special damage, the damage is adjusted accordingly after the factors are summed up.

While wandering the northern lands with Mara, Bellina found herself within the realm of the kingdom of gold. There, she found a book that gave her the power to control the minds of others. Mara and the Outlaws of Justice attempted to restrain Bellina's thirst for revenge, but it was all to no avail. Seizing the minds of Mara and her gang, Bellina headed south.

Bellina affixes [Third Eye] to {10630@MaxTargetCount} hero(es) besides herself and summoned creatures. [Third Eye] generates {1063000@TickShield} Protection every {1063000@TickTime} sec. After staring into the void with the Ancient Book of Gold, Bellina stood face to face with the abyss. When Mara reunited with Bellina, the old friend who had shared all the joys and sorrows with her in the Red Outlaws of Justice was nowhere to be found. All that remained before her was a corrupted soul, devising an aftermath far beyond the fall of the Empire — the end of the world.

The ancient book that was used to read and control people's minds in the kingdom of gold that perished long ago. The leaders that followed the golden rule wielded this book to lift the darkness away from the minds of subjects and guide them to the shining light.

- Beach Festival Welcome to King God Castle's Summer Beach Festival. Construct buildings using Event Tokens and obtain Bronze, Silver, and Gold Tokens to buy items at the Beach Festival Shop!
- Event Token At the Beach Festival, you can use Event Tokens to construct buildings. You can earn Event Tokens in content that requires Supplies, including Invasion, Investigation Team, and the Great Rift.
- Manage Buildings You can construct buildings via "Manage Buildings." The buildings consist of Fisher, Stall, and Store, which can be constructed on Fishing Site, Stall Site, and Store Site, respectively. Please note you can only construct one of each building.
- Festival Level Festival levels increase whenever you construct two buildings. The buildings you can build become more diverse as your festival level grows.
- Bronze, Silver, and Gold Tokens The festival buildings produce a certain number of Bronze, Silver, or Gold Tokens per hour. The produced Bronze and Silver Tokens are collected automatically, while Gold Tokens must be claimed by tapping the token button.
- Festival Missions Clear a wide range of daily and festival missions to obtain various currencies, including Event Tokens in addition to Bronze, Silver, and Gold Tokens!
- Festival Shop Purchase consumables, summoning currencies, skins, and more using the Bronze, Silver, and Gold Tokens you've claimed!

We are ready to open the dimension gate to the void.
All right, go ahead and open it.
Commander Evan, lead your knights back to the central region. After that, focus on defending against the monsters that emerged from the rift.
Wait for me, Mel, Farael, and Aramis. We're coming to save you soon.
That Aramis is still a handful. Well, your big sister is coming to personally rescue you.
Hold on, Bardrey! It's too dangerous to enter without knowing what's inside.
Father, the world will come to an end if we don't act now.
We will lead the remaining imperial forces back to the capital.
What? Why are we going back when we should also head inside the root out the problem?
Do not forget our duty, Rosaline.
What will you do, former prince?
I cannot deny that I'm responsible for all this, so I'll acknowledge my mistakes and make amends by heading inside. My ancient relics will be of use.
I'm not sure if we can completely trust you yet, but I can't deny your usefulness.
Ahem! We can't give up on the ancient relics from the kingdom of gold. Supplies will be handled by us.
You know there's no need to ask me. I'm going to avenge Kalina.
Well, it seems like it's our turn to decide.
It's times like these when our small group of elites is useful. Why don't we place our trust on the heroes that are still in the east and bring an end to our ill-fated relationship with Byakuren?
Haha, that is an unusual decision by you.
Okay! Time to show off our abilities!
We're not going on a vacation.
Still, it's reassuring to have Haerang and Zuo Bai join us.
It looks like our course has been decided. Crusaders of the central region, raise your swords. All heroes who share our resolve, join us!

-30 MP Cost for <Power of Rock>, +25% CRIT Chance for rock smash, +50% final damage Stuns enemies hit by rock smash for 2.5 sec

Maiu, believing that there should be only one true leader of the tribe, challenged Nibella to a duel and ultimately emerged victorious. He took her rune markings and inscribed them on his left arm, but soon realized the reason behind the tribe's tradition. Unable to control the overwhelming power of the runes, he went berserk.

The rune markings passed down in Maiu's tribe grant immense strength. However, in exchange for this power, the user's body must withstand the burden of the rampaging force, making it difficult to maintain focus.

During <Annihilation Time>, Neria's Attack Speed is fixed to {AtkSpeedByBaseAtkSpeedPer}% and her Range limit is lifted.
Haerang sends {AttackCount} concentrated waves that deal {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage an enemy and stun them for {StunTime} sec, starting with the nearest enemy.

Gidnil generates {10370@SelfSuperMAtkShield} Spell Block(s) upon himself. Spell Block negates the enemy's spell damage 1 time and blocks all harmful effects, such as stun, push back, slow, bewitching, terror, and stat reduction, included in the spell damage.

Kanak grants a terrible curse stack to the target and deals {10385@Damage} spell damage to all enemies with curse stacks, including the target. The curse on the target resonates to deal {1038000@TickDamage} extra spell damage per stack. (Max {MaxCurseStackCount} curse stacks on each target)

Rie summons {SummonUnitCountForDesc} Machina(s) and charges all of them at the target to deal {10400@Damage:MAtkPer} damage. There can be up to {MaxSummonCount} Machinas at once. They deal {SummonUnitAtkForDesc} spell damage on normal attacks, and all damage dealt by the Machinas is calculated as Rie's damage.

Nibella charges toward the back of the farthest enemy, swinging her great sword like a sandstorm and dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to all enemies within {SplashRangeX}{X}{SplashRangeY} range in the path of the charge.

Nibella charges toward the back of the farthest enemy, swinging her great sword like a sandstorm and dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to all enemies within {SplashRangeX}{X}{SplashRangeY} range in the path of the charge. After charging, she uses her skill {SkillCountForDesc} more time(s) to the farthest enemy.

Taebaek provokes {MaxTargetCount} nearest enemies for {TauntTime} sec and deals a total of {10426@Damage:MAtkPer} damage to {10425@SplashRangeX}{X}{10425@SplashRangeY} range. After {TauntTime} sec, he deals ({10426@Damage:MAtkPer} + {10426@DamagePerByDamagedSumDuringChanneling}% of the damage taken) damage to enemies in the same range.

With the power of the sacred censer, Esthea heals the ally with the lowest HP ratio within {RangeX}{X}{RangeY} range by {Heal:AtkPer:BaseValue}% of her ATK and grants Protection equal to {Shield:AtkPer:BaseValue}% of her ATK.

When placed in the front rows (front 2 rows), Baldir uses the shapeshifting skill of a druid to transform into <color=#ffcc00>Nature's Fury</color> form with {Unit@TransformHpForDesc} HP. When placed in the back rows (back 2 rows), he transforms into <color=#00bbff>Eternal Wisdom</color> form with {Unit@TransformIncreaseAtkSpeedForDesc} increased Attack Speed and {Unit@TransformIncreaseMAtkForDesc} increased Spell Power.

The next {RemoveBuffAfterAttackCount} normal attack(s) deal {104600@Damage} extra spell damage to enemies within {10465@SplashRangeX}{X}{10465@SplashRangeY} range in front. {Drain}% Physical/Spell HP Drain is applied to this damage.

The next {RemoveBuffAfterAttackCount} normal attacks deal {104600@Damage} extra spell damage to enemies within {10465@SplashRangeX}{X}{10465@SplashRangeY} range in front. {Drain}% Physical/Spell HP Drain is applied to these normal attacks.
Baldir concentrates the mana of the forest and unleashes it as droplets to deal {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to up to {AttackCount} nearest enemies.

Instead of inflicting normal attacks, Ian concentrates for {ChannelingTime} sec. Then, he charges to the target to inflict {10485@AttackCount} normal attacks that deal physical normal damage equal to ({10485@Damage:AtkPer:BaseValue}+{10485@Damage:AtkPer:MAtkPer})% of ATK to all enemies within {10485@SplashRangeX}{X}{10485@SplashRangeY} range in front.

Instead of inflicting normal attacks, Ian concentrates for {ChannelingTime} sec. Then, he charges to the target to inflict {10485@AttackCount} normal attacks that deal physical normal damage equal to ({10485@Damage:AtkPer:BaseValue}+{10485@Damage:AtkPer:MAtkPer})% of ATK to all enemies within {10485@SplashRangeX}{X}{10485@SplashRangeY} range in front. The first Stride used on each target deals damage with {AddDamagePerWhenFirstAttackForDesc}% enhanced final damage to enemies within {1048010@SplashRangeX}{X}{1048010@SplashRangeY} range instead of {10485@SplashRangeX}{X}{10485@SplashRangeY}.

Instead of inflicting normal attacks, concentrates for {ChannelingTime} sec. Then, charges to the target to inflict {10485@AttackCount} normal attacks that deal damage equal to ({10485@Damage:AtkPer}+{10485@Damage:AtkPer:MAtkPer})% of ATK. Final damage increases by {1048025@AddDamagePerEveryAtkCount}% on each attack.

Ophelia uses blood magic to deal {Damage} damage to all enemies within {RangeX}{X}{RangeY} range nearby {AttackCount} time(s) and applies {DrainOnHit}% Spell HP Drain. After dealing damage {Unit@SkillHitCountToChangeSkill} time(s), the range of <Blood and Soul> is increased by {104905@IncreaseSplashRangeForDesc} block(s) on its next use.

Kirdan deals damage {AttackCount:BaseValue} time(s) in total to all enemies within {SplashRangeX}{X}{SplashRangeY} range nearby for {TotalAttackTime} sec, with every {AttackCountAtTickForDesc} attack(s) dealing {Damage:BaseValue}+{Damage:MAtkPer}. He deals damage {IncreaseAttackCountForDesc} more time(s) for every {AttackSpeedPerForDesc}% Attack Speed that exceeds {OverRatioForDesc}%. Upon using this skill, Kirdan moves to the location where he can attack the most enemies.

Victoria calls her favorite steed Whiterun to mount for {105205@Time} sec, dealing {Damage} damage and pushing them back by {Knockback} block(s) if there is an enemy nearby. While in the mounted state, her Movement Speed increases by {105200@MoveSpeedPer}% and she gains {105205@PriorityShield:MAtkPer} Protection. Upon mounting the horse, she prioritizes pursuing enemies who are pushed back. Victoria dismounts her horse on her next normal attack and deals physical normal damage equal to {10520@Damage:AtkPer:BaseValue}% of ATK to enemies within {10520100@SplashRangeX}{X}{10520100@SplashRangeY} blocks in front.

Aenrath ambushes the farthest enemy to deal {Damage:MAtkPer} damage. For {10535@Time} sec, normal attacks deal damage equal to {105300@Damage:AtkPer:BaseValue}% of ATK to all enemies within {105300@SplashRangeX}{X}{105300@SplashRangeY} blocks nearby.

Elizabeth recalls all Stone Spirits she summoned, then deals {10550@Damage:BaseValue}+{10550@Damage:MAtkPer} damage to all enemies within {10550@SplashRangeX}{X}{10550@SplashRangeY} range near the Stone Spirits and stuns them for {10550@StunTime} sec. Elizabeth summons {SummonCountForDesc} Stone Spirit(s) again. (Max {Unit@GlobalMaxSummonCount} Stone Spirits on the battlefield)

Before the battle starts, Saeryung links herself and the nearest ally. She uses the spell that has been passed down for generations to grant {ConnectedMAtkBuffPer}% of Spell Power to the linked target for {Time} sec. The granted stats increase the target hero's stats by converting Saeryung's stats into the target hero's basic stats. Saeryung amplifies the linked target's skill damage by {BaseSkillDamageMul}%. (Multiple Saeryungs cannot link to the same target.)

Farael casts Arcane Spell that lashes out in a random direction. The spell deals {105700@Damage:MAtkPer} damage {AttackCount} time(s) to enemies in all blocks within one random direction among the four directions. When the target is killed, the remaining Arcane Spell is cast to another nearby enemy.

Farael casts Arcane Spell that lashes out in a random direction. The spell deals {105700@Damage:MAtkPer} damage {AttackCount} time(s) to enemies in {1057011@SplashRangeY} block(s) within one random direction among the four directions. When the target is killed, the remaining Arcane Spell is cast to another nearby enemy.

Farael casts Arcane Spell that lashes out in a random direction. The spell deals {105700@Damage:MAtkPer} damage {AttackCount} time(s) to enemies in {1057011@SplashRangeX} block(s) within one random direction among the four directions. When the target is killed, the remaining Arcane Spell is cast to another nearby enemy.

Upon taking damage, Garam has a {Unit@MissRatio}% chance of evading. Successful evasion negates damage and crowd controls and also grants {Unit@AddTechniqueAtMiss} TP. When TP is full, she charges at the target to deal {Damage:MAtkPer} spell damage, then inflicts {10585@AttackCount} normal attack(s) with damage equal to {10585@TickDamage:AtkPer:BaseValue}% of her ATK.

Saras calls upon the power of the void to summon {SummonUnitCountForDesc} hallucination(s) that last for {10605@Time} sec. The hallucinations are not targetable and deal damage equal to (<color=#ffcc00>{10610@Damage:AtkPer:BaseValue}</color>+{10610@Damage:AtkPer:MAtkPer})% of Saras's ATK.

With a kick that holds the power of the White Tiger, Jinju Deals {Damage} damage to all enemies within {SplashRangeSum} vertical range in front. After using <Tiger Gale Kick> {NeedComboCount} time(s), she moves to the position where she can hit the most enemies based on the target, and uses <Skyrending Tiger>, dealing {10625@Damage} damage to all enemies within {10625@SplashRangeX} horizontal block(s) in front.

Bellina affixes [Third Eye] to herself at the beginning of the battle. Upon using this skill, she affixes [Third Eye] to {10630@MaxTargetCount} hero(es) besides herself and summoned creatures. [Third Eye] generates {1063000@TickShield} Protection every {1063000@TickTime} sec. Upon using this skill, each affixed [Third Eye] deals {106300@BeadDamage} damage to the nearest enemy. (Max {1063010@MaxBuffOverlap} [Third Eyes] can exist at the same time.)

Sargula obtains {Unit@AddTechniqueAtTeamOrEnemyDead} Void whenever an ally or enemy dies. She enters [Void Form] upon obtaining max Void. During [Void Form], she deals physical damage equal to ({10655@Damage:AtkPer:BaseValue}+{10655@Damage:AtkPer:MAtkPer})% of ATK to all enemies within {10655@SplashRangeX}{X}{10655@SplashRangeY} range every {10650@NeedComboCount+1} normal attacks.

Completely absorbing the power of the void, Sargula deals physical damage equal to ({10655@Damage:AtkPer:BaseValue}+{10655@Damage:AtkPer:MAtkPer})% of ATK to all enemies within {10655@SplashRangeX}{X}{10655@SplashRangeY} range every {NeedComboCount+1} normal attacks.

The Litere family, a prestigious lineage of the Empire, has produced outstanding talents in various fields. Although Patros, a member of the Litere family, was not born with innate abilities, he became an exemplary commanding officer of the Imperial Army through exceptional effort.

Encourages allies for {TotalAttackTime} sec, healing all allies within {SplashRangeX}{x}{SplashRangeY} range nearby by {Heal} every {Time} sec while also increasing their Attack Speed by {AttackSpeedPerUnit10670}% every time. The highest Attack Speed increase is applied among the increases from skills with the same name.

For {TotalAttackTime} sec, heals allies within {SplashRangeX}{x}{SplashRangeY} range nearby by {Heal} every {Time} sec while also increasing their Attack Speed by {AttackSpeedPerUnit10670}% every time. Only the highest Attack Speed increase from <For the Empire!> is applied.

Patros commands the battlefield and encourages allies for {TotalAttackTime} sec, granting all allies within {SplashRangeX}{x}{SplashRangeY} range nearby {Heal} healing and {AttackSpeedPerUnit10670}% Attack Speed increase every {Time} sec. Only the highest Attack Speed increase from <For the Empire!> is applied.

When the Great Rift opened and the Empire was plunged into chaos by the invasion of countless void monsters, Patros was at the forefront of the battlefield. In the fierce battle against the void monsters, Patros inspired his faltering allies with the winds of courage until the very end, and after the battle, he was promoted to chiliarch.
Putting in effort and more effort
Elevating the family's honor and gaining recognition
Dislikes his own lack of exceptional qualities compared to his cousin, Zupitere, and has a grand dream of becoming a hero to bring honor to his family through hard work.

The dark red banner adorned with a lion, flown on the battlefield by the Imperial Army, symbolizes the Empire and the Emperor. It represents the overwhelming military power and the indomitable will of the Empire's forces.

Are you the king who recently defended against all the monsters?
Please gather strong heroes once again. You must destroy the awakened divine Incarnates and subdue the god's flames.
If you defeat an Incarnate, you will receive fitting rewards.
First, you need to form the Raiders.
To form the Raiders, you need to select a mercenary to support other Raiders.
Heroes selected as mercenaries can also be included in the Raiders.
Please select the heroes and Relics to be included in the Raider formation.
You can form the Raiders using the loot obtained from 5 battles. You will face the Incarnate with the troop formation used in the final battle.
Alright then, let's begin the raid against the Incarnates.
When you raid the Incarnates for the first time at each level, you can obtain the rewards listed below.
Please select the Incarnate you wish to raid.
Here, you can view information about the powerful Incarnates.
Do not be too afraid. Even if the deployed Raiders are defeated, you can send another group of heroes to continue the fight.
Please select the Raiders to participate in the raid.
You can view the information of the created Raiders above.

Now, it's time to face a divine Incarnate.
Good luck.

The Herald of Blood resonates with the Blood Crystal. The Blood Crystal is prioritized as the target for healing skills used by heroes, and the healing it receives is greatly increased depending on Guard. All heroes are healed by a portion of the healing received by the Blood Crystal.
The final damage fluctuates between +2400% and -40% based on <Herald's Energy>. <Herald's Energy> increases when the Herald takes damage and decreases when the Blood Crystal is healed.
If <Herald's Energy> is at 9,000 or above for 2 sec, uses <Berserk Blood> to deal massive damage to all heroes, stunning them for 2 sec.
The final damage is reduced by up to 90% based on <Herald's Energy>.
