Ithena the Great Warrior of Gold

Ithena was born as the youngest of the three sisters of the Ptensia family, one of the five pillars of the Gold City. True to the Ptensia family's reverence for strength above all else, she was trained under the finest warriors and earned the title of Great Warrior by the age of twenty.
When a void ritual occurred in the Gold City, she entered the Great Rift chasing strength and imbued her body with the power of the dark gods.
Void is recovered when dealing normal attacks. A hero that uses Void can gain additional Void in a special way.

For {TotalAttackTime} sec, heals allies within {SplashRangeX}{x}{SplashRangeY} range nearby by {Heal} every {Time} sec while also recovering their MP by {ManaHeal} and increasing their final Spell Power by {1067000@TotalMAtkPerUnit10670}.

Patros commands the battlefield and encourages allies for {TotalAttackTime} sec, healing all allies within {SplashRangeX}{x}{SplashRangeY} range nearby by {Heal} every {Time} sec while also recovering their MP by {ManaHeal} and increasing their final Spell Power by {1067000@TotalMAtkPerUnit10670}. Only the highest final Spell Power increase from <For the Empire!> is applied.

Recovers 8/15/20/40 MP per second to allies within range of <For the Empire!> while increasing their final Spell Power by 5/10/20/30% for 1 sec, removing the Attack Speed increase effect The increase in final Spell Power does not stack with skills with the same name and the highest effect is applied
You've joined the Alliance of Kings. Now it's time to face formidable enemies that can only be defeated by joining forces with other kings.
The Incarnates in the Alliance Raid are similar to those in the Solo Raid, but they have significantly higher HP.
Let's check the information on the Incarnates before moving on.
Here, you can view information about the powerful Incarnates.
First, you need to form the Raiders.
To form the Raiders, you need to select a mercenary to support other Alliance members.
Heroes selected as mercenaries can also be included in the Raiders.
Please select the heroes and Relics to be included in the Raider formation.
Please select the Altars to empower the Raiders.
You can form the Raiders using the loot obtained from 10 battles. You will face the Incarnates with the troop formation used in the final battle.
Divine Power can be obtained during battle and helps the Raiders deal more damage when attacking the Incarnates.
However, as Divine Power increases, the enemies faced by the Raiders during formation become stronger, so please be cautious.
If you select Silver, you can increase the size of your Troop.
All these choices depend on you, so make your decisions wisely.

Now, it's time to join forces with other kings and stop the divine Incarnates.
Good luck.

The Herald of Blood resonates with the Blood Crystal. The Blood Crystal is prioritized as the target for healing skills used by heroes, and the healing it receives is greatly increased depending on Guard. All heroes are healed by a portion of the healing received by the Blood Crystal.
The final damage fluctuates between +4000% and -40% based on <Herald's Energy>. <Herald's Energy> increases when the Herald takes damage and decreases when the Blood Crystal is healed.
If <Herald's Energy> is at 9,000 or above for 2 sec, uses <Berserk Blood> to deal massive damage to all heroes, stunning them for 2 sec.
The final damage is reduced by up to 90% based on <Herald's Energy>.
For 3 sec, -99.99% final damage dealt by hero who healed the Blood Crystal
-2,500 Herald's Energy consumed upon using <Berserk Blood>

The Hero Incarnate uses the <Advance of Great Warriors> skill to summon up to 4 Great Warriors. We recommend heroes who use skills with wide ranges to deal damage to a large number of Great Warriors.
The Blacksmith Incarnate uses the <Craftsman's Trap> skill to set traps and weaken heroes on them. You need heroes who can change positions using their skills.
The Blood Incarnate uses the <Blood Harvest> skill to obtain Mighty Block for each enemy hit by the skill. We recommend deploying only a few heroes who can quickly strike the opponent multiple times.
The Giant Incarnate uses the <Giant's Stroke> skill to push heroes back. You need heroes who can support others and prevent them from being pushed back.

The Mage Incarnate uses the <Silence of Mana> skill to block heroes from using their skills and reduces its spell damage taken. You must ensure that heroes use their skills before the Incarnate uses <Silence of Mana>.
The Greed Incarnate uses the <Golden Blessing> skill to reduce its damage taken. Since <Golden Blessing> is removed when the Incarnate is stunned, we recommend heroes who can stun their opponent.

The Herald of Blood's damage taken changes according to <Herald's Energy>. Since <Herald's Energy> is reduced when the Herald of Blood heals its <Blood Crystal>, we recommend heroes with healing abilities.

Greetings, King of Humans. It has been a while.
I am Luminesera, the Oracle of the Eternal Forest.

You have bravely overcome formidable foes of the past. Congratulations.
However, the battles ahead will be challenging, as the enemies you will face in the future possess transcendental strength.

I, Luminesera, will assist you.
Let's together thwart the darkness within Memories of Eternity.

Powerful elite monsters are strengthening the boss.
If you defeat the elite monsters using special methods, you can weaken the boss.

We've recorded the weaknesses of the elite monsters through the memories of the Eternal Forest.
Click on the eye to check their weaknesses.

By targeting the weaknesses of each round's elite enemy, you can weaken the boss's skill.
If you fail to do so, you'll face a powerful boss, so I recommend you target the weaknesses.

Your Majesty,
It may be difficult, but I believe that with the heroes by your side, you can overcome even transcendent beings. Trust in the heroes who accompany you and move forward.

Once a priestess of the Golden Kingdom, Ne'ath was caught in a void ritual, losing her mortal body to be reborn as the second of the three sisters of the void. She aids her two sisters in banishing all that bothers her back into the void.

Instead of inflicting normal attacks, heals an ally equal to ({Heal:AtkPer:BaseValue}+{Heal:AtkPer:MAtkPer})% of ATK. If the healing exceeds the ally's Max HP, gains additional {OverHealTechnique} Void. When Void is full, increases all allies' final damage by {107100@TotalDamagePerUnit10710}% for {107100@Time} sec.
When Ne'ath with the highest tier consumes Void, she grants invincibility to 2 allies with the lowest HP ratio for 2 sec.

Ptensia, the second oldest of the three sisters, became a priestess of the kingdom at a young age, thanks to her innate prowess in wielding light magic. However, Ne'ath, who desired power, used her exceptional political skills to rise to the position of Archbishop and sought to bend the entire kingdom to her will.
Her two sisters who fight on her behalf
When she has to act on her own
Though forcefully caught in the Great Rift, she was drawn to the power of the Void she had gained unintentionally, which led her to abandon the power of light.

When the Herald's Energy is at 9,000 or above, consumes {Unit@ClanRaidBossPowerAmountWhenSkill} Herald's Energy and deals {Damage:MAtkPer} damage to all enemies. The Herald's Energy increases whenever the Herald takes damage and decreases whenever the Blood Crystal is healed.

When the Herald's Energy is at 9,000 or above, consumes {Unit@ClanRaidBossPowerAmountWhenSkill} Herald's Energy and deals {Damage:MAtkPer} damage to all enemies. The Herald's Energy increases whenever the Herald takes damage and decreases whenever the Blood Crystal is healed.
Your Castle Level needs to be at least <color=#ffbd4a>{0}</color> to join an Alliance.
Here, you can try <color=#ffc13d>summoning</color> to obtain new heroes.
Summoning provides a more enhanced effect every 4 times.
Let's level up the summoned hero Chung Ah.
You can level up heroes using the <color=#ffc13d>Hero Growth</color> button.
Leveling up requires a certain amount of EXP for each level.

EXP can be obtained from Invasion, summoning, etc. Even if there is no EXP for the hero, it is possible to convert using the items below into EXP.
This time, I will provide the necessary EXP.

If you have the required EXP, you can level up by paying Gold and pressing the <color=#ffc13d>Level Up</color> button.
I will also provide the necessary Gold. Please press the Level Up button.

Each time you level up a hero, their various stats increase.
You can close the window by pressing the Confirm button.
Upon reaching a certain level, each hero gains an additional effect called <color=#ffc13d>Potential Ability</color>.
Now, please register the leveled up Chung Ah to the Troop.

Greetings, King of the Castle. I am Commander Aslyn.
I will show you how to use the item you obtained,<color=#ffc13d>Cube of Power</color>.

Cube of Power is one of the ways to level up a hero.
It is an item that can substitute the <color=#ffc13d>EXP and Gold required for hero level-up</color>.

Cube of Power can be used on the hero level-up window.
Please select Chung Ah.
There are several ways to level up the heroes of King God Castle.

There is also <color=#ffc13d>Shard of Growth</color> that substitutes the Gold cost required for hero level-up,
<color=#ffc13d>Cube of EXP</color> that allows you to obtain the EXP required for hero level-up,
and <color=#ffc13d>Cube of Power</color> that can substitute both the Gold and EXP required for hero level-up.
Among them, Cube of Power is only applicable to <color=#ffc13d>heroes at level 9 or below</color>.

I hope you quickly power up your heroes and defend the castle by using Cube of Power.
Good luck.

Greetings, King of the Castle. I am Commander Aslyn.
The new mode <color=#ffc13d>Expedition</color> has been unlocked! Let me briefly explain about the Expedition.

Expedition is a game mode that can be played with different rules from Invasion.
To play Expedition, you need the exclusive resource <color=#ffc13d>Expedition Flag</color>. Every day, 6 Flags are recharged.

Each Expedition has different game rules, and the Expeditions you can play vary by day of the week.
You can obtain various rewards in Expeditions.
In <color=#ffc13d>Golblin Hunt Down!</color>, you can obtain <color=#ffc13d>Gold</color> after defeating the golblins.
In <color=#ffc13d>Elite Invasion!</color>, you can obtain <color=#ffc13d>Book of EXP</color> after defeating the powerful enemies of each invasion.
In <color=#ffc13d>Hero Invasion?!</color>, you will face other heroes and can obtain <color=#ffc13d>Pass Points</color>.

I hope you defend the castle successfully by obtaining the desired items from Expeditions each day of the week.
Good luck.

Greetings, King of the Castle. I am Commander Aslyn.
I came after hearing the news that the new region <color=#ffc13d>Tower of Trials</color> has opened. Let me guide you through the Tower of Trials.
Tower of Trials is a new game mode with a play style different from Invasion.
Press the Enter button to enter the Tower of Trials.
Tower of Trials <color=#ffc13d>consists of one battle per floor</color>. Each time you clear a floor, you will move onto a higher floor.
In Tower of Trials, <color=#ffc13d>equipment with fixed effects</color> is provided, and you can check it here.
In Tower of Trials, <color=#ffc13d>Altar effects are not applied.</color> You will set up heroes and Relics for battle.
After entering, you can proceed with the battle manually. There is also an <color=#ffc13d>Auto-Proceed</color> feature where heroes battle automatically.
If you clear a floor, you can obtain the following rewards.
If you purchase the <color=#ffc13d>Tower of Trials Pass</color>, you can also obtain the following additional rewards.
Tower of Trials exists in each region.

For example, unlike the "Tower of Trials" where you could select all heroes,
in the <color=#ffc13d>{0}</color>, only <color=#ffc13d>{1} region</color> heroes can be selected.

I hope you conquer all the Towers of Trials.
Good luck.

Greetings, King of the Castle. I am Commander Aslyn.
I came after hearing the news that you can now join an<color=#ffc13d><Alliance></color>. Let me guide you through the Alliance.

An Alliance is a place where you can interact and cooperate with other kings.
You can exchange conversations with each other, and through Alliance support, you can complement each other's lacking Hero EXP.
Additionally, through <color=#ffc13d>Alliance Raid</color> and <color=#ffc13d>Alliance skills</color>, etc., you can gain various beneficial effects by cooperating with each other.
Here, you can search for a specific Alliance and join.

Additionally, to find an Alliance suitable for you,
you can set the <color=#ffc13d>language primarily used in the Alliance</color> and the <color=#ffc13d>keywords pursued by the Alliance</color>.
By clicking on the Alliances here, you can check the info of each Alliance, and you can also join one.
If there is no Alliance to your liking, you can create one yourself.

I hope you can enhance your reputation by being part of an Alliance that overcomes hardships together.
Good luck.

Greetings, King of the Castle. I am Commander Aslyn.
{0} has reached level 16 and can now be <color=#ffc13d>Awakened</color>. Let me guide you through Awakening.
When a hero is Awakened, <color=#ffc13d>they can use one of the two Awakened Abilities to become more powerful.</color> Please check each Awakened Ability.
To use these abilities, you must <color=#ffc13d>Awaken</color> the hero. You can proceed with Awakening through <color=#ffc13d>Hero Growth</color>, similar to leveling up.
To Awaken a hero, in addition to the EXP and Gold, you need an item called <color=#ffc13d>Hero's Token</color>. Hero's Tokens possessed by the hero are displayed in the designated area.
You can obtain Hero's Tokens mainly from <color=#ffc13d>Hero Summon</color>, and you can also convert <color=#ffc13d>King's Tokens</color> below to Hero's Tokens.
Additionally, Hero's Tokens are used not only for Awakening, but also for <color=#ffc13d>level-up after Awakening</color>.

I hope you have an easier time defending the castle by using the Awakened Abilities of heroes.
Good luck.

Greetings, King of the Castle. I am Commander Aslyn.
Let me guide you about <color=#ffc13d>forging Relics</color>.

<color=#ffc13d>Forging is a way to make Relics stronger</color>.
<color=#BBE3FB>I will explain using the Relic I have.</color>
Forging is a system that allows you to change the <color=#ffc13d>Relic options</color>, through which you can maximize synergy with heroes.
Forging is only possible for <color=#ffc13d>King God Relics</color>. You can enter the forging window by pressing the <color=#ffc13d>Forge button</color>.
Through forging, the following options are <color=#ffc13d>all changed randomly</color>.

If there are options you do not wish to change, you can press the <color=#ffc13d>lock</color> button on the right to keep those options. If more options are locked, the forging cost <color=#ffc13d>increases</color>.
If you have decided on the options to change, now select the <color=#ffc13d>material</color>.

You can add a <color=#ffc13d>same Relic or Forge Stone</color> in the material slot.
<color=#ffc13d>The higher the grade of the selected material, the lower the forging cost.</color>

Then, you can select a <color=#ffc13d>Catalyst</color>. A Catalyst can <color=#ffc13d>adjust the values of the changing options to some extent</color>. Depending on the type of Catalyst, it can make only <color=#ffc13d>specific types of options appear</color>, and it can also make only options of <color=#ffc13d>specific phases or higher appear</color>.
<color=#BBE3FB>Let's use the</color> <color=#ffc13d>King God Shining Catalyst</color> <color=#BBE3FB>that makes all options appear only at phase 3 or higher.</color>

If you have decided on the options to change, the material, and the Catalyst, you can now pay the cost and start forging. You can start forging by paying with Gems or Gold, but <color=#ffc13d>if you use a high-grade Forge Stone like now, the cost becomes 0.</color>
Press the <color=#ffc13d>Yes</color> button to start forging.
If you have forged, you can compare the Relic <color=#ffc13d>before forging</color> and <color=#ffc13d>after forging</color>.

Each time you forge, a value called <color=#ffc13d>Forging Energy</color> increases. When this Forging Energy reaches 100%, you obtain a <color=#ffc13d>Polishing Stone</color>, a material that allows you to change Relic options.
<color=#ffc13d>I will explain 'polishing' and 'Polishing Stones' later.</color>
You can immediately retry forging by pressing the <color=#ffc13d>Reforge button</color>. You can check the <color=#ffc13d>materials, Catalysts, and currency consumed during forging</color> here.
If you think the options after forging are better, you can press the <color=#ffc13d>After button</color> to change the Relic to those options.

Conversely, if you think the options before forging are better, you can press the <color=#ffc13d>Before button</color> to keep the options as they are.
<color=#BBE3FB>I will press the Before button to keep the options.</color>

I hope your Relics also become stronger through forging.
Good luck.

Greetings, King of the Castle. I am Commander Aslyn.
This time, let me guide you about <color=#ffc13d>polishing Relics</color>.

<color=#ffc13d>Polishing is a way to perfect forged Relics</color>.
<color=#BBE3FB>I will explain using the Relic I have.</color>
Polishing, like forging, is only possible for <color=#ffc13d>King God Relics</color>, and it can be done in the following location.
First, I will select one of my Relics.

When you use polish, you can select one of the Relic's options,
and perform one action between <color=#ffc13d>Enhance</color> and <color=#ffc13d>Move Position</color>.
<color=#ffc13d>Enhance</color> enhances the selected Relic option by one phase.
If you select <color=#ffc13d>Move Position</color>, it moves the position of the selected Relic option.
I will use Enhance among these to enhance the Relic option to a higher phase.
Polishing uses <color=#ffc13d>Polishing Stones</color> that can be obtained during forging.

Each Polishing Stone fills the <color=#ffc13d>Polishing Gauge</color> by a set value.
The Polishing Gauge varies depending on the selected option's phase and other factors.

If the gauge is full, you can start polishing.
You can preview the results of polishing here.
My Relic has become a bit more perfect this way!

I hope you will also perfectly defend the castle with Relics that have become more perfect through polishing.
Good luck.

Greetings, King of the Castle. I am Commander Aslyn.
Now, you are qualified to participate in <color=#ffc13d><Strife Battlefield></color>.

Strife Battlefield is a <color=#ffc13d>mode where you compete in real time</color> by interacting with other kings.
In Strife Battlefield, you send monsters to other kings and defend against monsters sent by other kings.

You can select the Troop to use in Strife Battlefield.
This slot reflects the settings of the Barracks slots but does not affect the Barracks slots in return.
In Strife Battlefield, the <color=#ffc13d>monsters you can use</color> and <color=#ffc13d>Heroes' stats</color> are adjusted by season.
If you select <color=#ffc13d>Assault Summon Stone</color> or <color=#ffc13d>Hero Stats Adjustment</color> from the top tab, the season info for each will be shown here.
Press this button for more details.
In Strife Battlefield, you are primarily matched with random opponents, but you can also gather with desired kings to proceed with a <color=#ffc13d>Friendly Battle</color>.

Greetings, King of the Castle. I am Commander Aslyn.
I would like to show you how to transcend the <color=#ffc13d>Legacy you have obtained</color>.

<color=#ffc13d>Tier transcendence</color> is a system that can grant additional effects to the abilities of a Legacy.
Please tap on a Legacy to check its info.
Here, you can easily check the transcendence effects.
Press the <color=#ffc13d>Tier Transcendence</color> button to transcend the tier of the selected Legacy.
All Legacies can go through <color=#ffc13d>a total of 10 tiers</color> of transcendence.

Each time you transcend the tier of a Legacy,
you can grant <color=#ffc13d>additional effects</color> to the Legacy.

Additionally, <color=#ffc13d>when a Legacy's transcendence tier increases,
the maximum level of a Legacy increases in proportion to its rarity</color>.
To transcend the tier of a Legacy, you must <color=#ffc13d>use an identical Legacy as material</color>.

If you do not have an identical Legacy,
you can use a special item called <color=#ffc13d>Transcendence Ingot</color> as material.

<color=#ffc13d>Transcendence Ingot can be used as material for any Legacy</color>,
but <color=#ffc13d>the cost of selecting materials may increase depending on the rarity</color>.

You can now transcend your Legacies to defend your castle more effectively.
Good luck.

Greetings, King of the Castle. I am Commander Aslyn.
Let me guide you about <color=#ffc13d>enhancing Accessories</color>.

Accessories have their own levels, and you can <color=#ffc13d>enhance</color> them by leveling them up.
Please select an Accessory.
You can level up Accessories using the <color=#ffc13d>Enhance</color> button.
Here, you can proceed with the enhancement.

The secondary stat of an Accessory is unlocked based on the <color=#ffc13d>rarity and level</color> of the Accessory.
Each time you level it up, <color=#ffc13d>the following secondary stats are added or enhanced.</color>
<color=#ffc13d>When the accumulated EXP on an Accessory exceeds a certain amount, the level of the Accessory increases</color>.

By selecting enhancement materials, you can grant EXP to an Accessory.
The enhancement material, <color=#ffc13d>Accessory Piece</color>, can be obtained by dismantling other Accessories.
When enhancing Accessories, a certain amount of <color=#ffc13d>Gold</color> is also required in addition to enhancement materials.
Additionally, you can <color=#ffc13d>automatically select materials to quickly increase to the corresponding level</color>.

I hope you defend the castle with greater strength through enhancing Accessories.
Good luck.

When you equip a Relic, there is an effect that <color=#ffc13d>grants additional stats</color> to heroes besides the basic abilities.
This is called <color=#ffc13d>Relic option</color>.

Relic options have effects that increase <color=#ffc13d>HP, ATK, Attack Speed, and Spell Power</color>,
and grant these additional effects to <color=#ffc13d>heroes in the following positions</color>.

Relic options are unleashed one by one as the Relic's tier increases,
and when reaching the highest tier, <color=#ffc13d>King God Tier, each Relic can receive 4 Relic options</color>.
An insignia signifying appointment as a successor Those chosen as successors advance more bravely than anyone.
A command banner given to a successor. It boosts heroes' morale and grants them great strength.

Grants {21605@GimmickStackCount} curse stack(s) to the enemy who kills the Cursed Hound. Upon using skill, deals {Damage} damage and grants {GimmickStackCount} curse stack(s) to the target. Damage dealt to the enemy increases by 1% for every owned curse stack. Upon granting 100 curse stacks, the enemy transforms into a werewolf.

Grants {21615@GimmickStackCount} curse stack(s) to the enemy who kills the Magic Bullet Marksman. Upon using skill, summons {SummonUnitCountDesc} Cursed Hound(s) and grants them {216105@AttackSpeedPer}% Attack Speed and {216105@MoveSpeedPer}% Movement Speed for {216105@Time} sec.

Grants {21625@GimmickStackCount} curse stacks to the enemy who kills the Mad Alchemist. After concentrating, deals {Damage} spell damage and grants {GimmickStackCount} curse stack(s) to all enemies, and heals all allies by {216200@HealByTargetMaxHpPer}% of their Max HP.

Grants {21635@GimmickStackCount} curse stack(s) to the enemy who kills the Grave Reaper. Upon using skill, moves to the enemy with the most cursed stacks to deal {Damage} spell damage and grant {GimmickStackCount} curse stack(s). Upon taking damage equal to 20% of Max HP or above, hides for {216350@Time} sec.

Grants {21645@GimmickStackCount} curse stack(s) to the enemy who kills the Bestial Hunter. Upon using skill, descends to the position with the most enemies to deal {Damage} spell damage to all enemies within {SplashRangeX}{x}{SplashRangeY} range and grants {GimmickStackCount} curse stack(s) to them. For every enemy hit, heals {HealPerEachSkillTarget:HpPer:BaseValue}% Max HP.

Grants {21655@GimmickStackCount} curse stack(s) to the enemy who kills the Night's Devourer. Upon using skill, generates Protection equal to current HP and charges at the farthest enemy within {RangeDesc} block(s) to deal {Damage} spell damage {AttackCountDesc} time(s) to all enemies within {SplashRangeX}{X}{SplashRangeY} range in the path of the charge.
Upon transformation, terrorizes all enemies on the map for {FearTime} sec. Upon normal attack, destroys {216600@RemoveShieldPer}% of the target's Protection before dealing damage.

Enters a channeling state to reduce damage taken by {216750@TotalTakeDamagePer}% for {ChannelingTime} sec. After {ChannelingTime} sec, if the Moonlight Stone is activated, deals {Damage} damage to all enemies and grants {21675@GimmickStackCount} curse stack(s) to a random hero.
Only takes damage from special damage. Becomes deactivated when losing all HP.
Defeat all Mad Alchemists with a hero possessing Mighty Block
Defeat all Bestial Hunters with 3 different types of North region heroes assigned
Defeat all Night's Devourers with a Central region hero
Targeting weakness weakens the boss's skills If all weaknesses are targeted, Moonlight Stone does not activate If all weaknesses fail to be targeted, boss skill is upgraded
Use <color=#ffcc00>Polishing Stones</color> to <color=#ffcc00>enhance</color> a Relic effect line or <color=#ffcc00>move the position</color> of a Relic effect.
You can obtain Magical Dust by dismantling Relics or purchasing them from the Corruption Token Shop. Which source would you like to select?
Select <color=#ffcc00>a Relic of the same tier</color> or a <color=#ffcc00>Combine Stone</color>.
Adding a <color=#ffcc00>catalyst</color> allows you to designate and change an effect. Locked effects will remain unchanged.
<color=#ffcc00>Select an effect</color> to enhance or move position.
Select the position of your choice.
The Relic effects of secondary stats are unlocked one line at a time as the tier increases.
Main stats affect all heroes, while each Relic effect of secondary stats only affect the hero in the spot marked with the icon.
The fewer the number of spots with effects, the higher the Relic effect's value. A fixed value is applied to each type of Relic effect.
The type of secondary stats that are applied vary depending on the main stats.
The number of initial secondary stats unlocked varies depending on the rarity of the Accessory.
The effect values of secondary stats are determined randomly, regardless of tier.
One random secondary stat is upgraded every 4 levels.
If a locked secondary stat exists when leveling up, the locked stat will be unlocked instead of a stat enhancement.
For Unique Accessories, increasing the Accessory's level to 20 provides up to 5 enhancement opportunities.
The blue values in skill descriptions are upgraded based on the hero's level.
The yellow values in skill descriptions are upgraded when the tier rises by combining heroes in battle.
Some heroes have skills that are not affected by level or tier.
Potential Abilities are unlocked through hero growth. One unlocks at hero level 4 and the other at hero level 8.
Once a hero reaches level 16 and successfully undergoes an awakening, you can choose and apply one of two Awakened Abilities.
Effects of Potential Abilities and Awakened Abilities are not upgraded based on the hero's level.
When leveling up with Gems, Book of EXP or Hero's Tokens are not consumed.
Heroes can be leveled up straight to level 16 before being awakened.

King's Tokens and Hero's Tokens are materials used for awakening and leveling up beyond level 16.
Once converted into EXP, they cannot be reverted.
Would you like to proceed with the conversion?

The Herald of Greed has a trait where its damage taken greatly increases whenever <Herald's Energy> rises above or falls below 5,000. To deal the most damage, you must deal physical and spell damage evenly to frequently change <Herald's Energy>.

Concentrates for {ChannelingTime} sec and randomly drops meteors that deal {Damage:AtkPer}+{Damage:MAtkPer} damage to enemies within {SplashRangeSum} block(s) {AttackCount} time(s). Deals an additional {DamageOnSplashRoot:MAtkPer} damage to targets at the center of the meteor.

Ashtar was once the court mage of the Golden Kingdom, but was caught in a void ritual, losing her mortal body and being reborn as the eldest of the three sisters of the void. Borrowing the strength of ancient beings, she seeks to spread the void throughout the world together with her sisters.

When using a map skin in the Arena, your map skin will be used in odd-numbered battles, and your opponent's map skin will be used in even-numbered battles.
If the opponent is using the default map skin in the Arena, your map skin will be used.
The map skin's winning streak effect refers to the effect where the map changes at Arena round 5, or when you achieve 5 or 10 consecutive wins in Strife.
The login screen refers to the background screen displayed during game loading or login.
The login screen from the most recently accessed account information will be applied.
When logging in with an account that has not set a login screen, the default login screen will be applied.

Faded: Cannot produce Rare or Unique Rift Equipment. After producing Rift Equipment, you gain 25 - 75 Dimensional Pieces.

God: Unique Rift Equipment guaranteed upon producing 100 times. After producing Rift Equipment, you gain 150 - 300 Dimensional Pieces.

Two dice are resting on the ancient Altar of Mage. The inscription on the Altar reads: "I bestow upon thee a sorcery, guided by fate' hand."
Receive a stronger elite selection reward <color=#ffc13d>three times</color>!
Receive a stronger elite selection reward!

You find a treasure chest near a sleeping monster.
You may be able to take the treasure before the monster wakes up.

The monster is still sleeping!
It looks like you can try taking another treasure.

A blacksmith, retired from civilization, offers his aid.
"What can I do for you? Is there a piece of equipment you'd like me to temper?"

You hear a voice beyond the closed door.
"Could you open this door, sir? Apologies for the delay—I got lost along the way!"
The voice sounds familiar, but you cannot lower your guard.
You open the door and see the shopkeeper standing before you.
You open the door, ready for battle, and a horde of monsters charge at you!

A man, his scent thick with medicine, appears with an offer.
"Why don't you take part in my research? I swear, I'll enhance every part of you!"

KABOOM! The man douses your equipment in mysterious liquid, and then an explosion erupts, sending a green cloud billowing through the air! When the smoke clears, you notice that all your equipment and Runes have completely transformed!
All equipped equipment and Runes are transformed into random equipment and Runes that are 1 tier higher.

You find a chest that can be opened by letting blood.
Immense rewards lie dormant within, but to claim them, a great blood sacrifice must be made.

The chest finally opens,
but your heroes suffer grievous wounds!
You come across a suspicious man who claims he can create a flawless copy of anything.
Select a Rune or equipment at God tier or below to make its copy.
Select a Rune or equipment at God tier or below to reduce its tier by 1.

"Haha, relax! To me, this is as easy as taking candy from a baby!"
The replication succeeds!

"Huh? How did this happen? Ugh, this must be my unlucky day."
The man damages your item and vanishes...
Obtain an item that is an exact copy of the equipment/Rune you selected.
The tier of the equipment/Rune you selected decreases by 1.

You stumble upon a small, silent shrine.
It seems to offer a divination service in exchange for Silver.
Donate <color=#ff2222>{0}</color> Silver and unveil your fate.
Obtain <color=#ffc13d>+{0}% Silver, HP Recovery, EXP rewards ({1} round(s))</color>

A Golblin greets you with an enticing offer.
"Welcome! We've got some especially tempting goods, just for you! And just this once, I'll let you have 'em for free!"
Obtain King tier Saving Rune x{0}
You took the Golblin's offer, and it paid off!
Ask the Golblin about their secret to success.
You asked the Golblin to share his secret to success!
You attacked the Golblin and obtained Silver!
Unfortunately, the investment failed, and the Golblin ran away...

"I'm furious! Absolutely livid!"
A man rants, overcome with anger.

"Seems I let anger get the best of me. My apologies."
Thanks to you, the man regains his composure, leaving behind a small token of gratitude before departing.
Change the probability of the other two choices.

"Listen, this is just absurd! It just makes no sense!"
The man seems to be angry still.

"I...don't know why you're giving me this Silver, but...you've managed to calm me down."
The man is perplexed by your action but hands you a small reward after calming down.

"Are you taking me for a beggar?!"
The man starts cursing at you out of anger.

With no other options to pacify him, the heroes take up their arms.
They succeed in subduing the man...but not without suffering wounds.

You dare raise your weapons against me?!
Seeing your heroes prepare for battle, the man charges at them, inflicting serious wounds.

You encounter a monster and hastily ready yourself for battle,
but the monster merely twirls its hand and says,
"I can't be bothered to fight, so why don't you just keep going your way? All I want is to lie here a while longer."

"Ugh, how annoying..."
Frustrated by your decision, the monster imbues its hand with magic and waves it.
A sudden wave of lethargy grips the heroes, just as a swarm of monsters ambushes them!

A figure approaches you with a bottle. It exudes a sweet aroma.
"I bring you an offer you can't refuse. Drink."

Upon drinking the liquid from the bottle, your heroes feel their blood surge.
"Sweet things often mask hidden dangers. Enjoy."
With those parting words, the figure vanishes.

"You there, I find myself rather thirsty. Fetch me some tea, at once."
A man, draped in garments so lavish they seem freshly woven from the crack in the Rift, is sitting gracefully and gazing down at you.

The man takes the potion and speaks with a satisfied look.
"Impressive. You shall be rewarded accordingly."
Receive a selection reward of a higher Tier!

"I made it clear I was thirsty. Nonetheless, I shall accept this gift with gratitude. Take your reward."
The man hands you Silver with a hint of dissatisfaction and departs.

"You would strike a man when he is at a disadvantage?!"
Furious, the man breaks past your heroes and flees.

"Such insolence! You dare ignore me?!"
You try to ignore the man, but he lunges at you in a fury. You and your heroes manage to retreat, but one suffers injuries in the process.

A monster gnawing on a piece of iron shouts at you.
"Help! I'm starving to death! Give me something—anything—to eat!"

"Graaack! It's not enough!"
The monster devours your items, yet its hunger seems to be unquenched. It clutches its hungry belly and vanishes into the unknown...

"Whew, you saved me. I thought I was done for."
With its hunger sated, the monster seems eager to offer you a reward.

"That was a feast to remember!"
The monster pats its belly and continues.
"As a reward, I'll grant you tiny bits of my scales!

A man, carrying an abundance of Runes under his clothes, walks toward you and yells.
"Your Runes look way better than mine! Let's trade!"

Following the exchange, the man carefully examines the Rune and says,
"Wait a minute... This is worse than what I gave you! Ugh, dang it!"
The man storms off in anger.

Just as the exchange takes place, the man suddenly snaps.
"No, I change my mind! I'm taking yours and keeping mine!"
In greed, he summons monsters and attacks you!

"Wait, now that I see you more clearly, you have nothing!"
The man gazes at you and hands you a rune before going his way.
"Just toss it aside along the way!"

You encounter an entity inside the rift of a different dimension. In the center of the rift with a ferocious mana storm, you see the silhouette of a colossal raptor take shape. Its form pulses with energy sharp as lightning itself, overflowing with mana. Then, the entity speaks, its voice echoing like thunder. "My old comrades, I offer you my power to aid in your journey, should you wish it." The thunder hawk silently unfurls its wings, preparing to bestow its might upon you.

"Good! May the winds of fortune carry you ever forward!”
The thunder hawk hands you a radiant feather gleaming with five distinct colors.

You encounter an entity inside the rift of a different dimension. It is an acrid world with the smell of steel and smoke. The entity is familiar, yet peculiar. It resembles the spirit you and your heroes have known, except its form is made not of stone but of solid steel. And though its body is of metal, the warmth of its heart is unmatched. Cautiously, it speaks, its voice laced with an electronic sound. "Expression of will: Joining your journey forward." The Spirit of Steel readies itself, prepared to remove a part of its own body and give it to you.

The spirit's part drifts around you.
"Partial synchronization complete. Activating perpetual defense system."
Its voice hums with happiness.

You encounter an entity inside the rift of a different dimension. It is the Eternal Forest that grew beyond the rules or reasons of the world. From eternity that silences even silence itself, she gazes upon you, her presence woven between roots untouched by light and branches tangled endlessly. Once a tiny spirit of this boundless grove, she has weathered countless cycles of end and beginning, rising at last as its last guardian. Breaking the silence, she speaks. "Visitors from another world, I do not wish for you to bear the burden of our sins.” She unleashes a part of her strength from the forest and gives it to you.

The power she bestows takes form. It is a flower.
"Worry not, visitors. Every spirit of the Eternal Forest will come to your aid."

You encounter an entity inside the rift of a different dimension. His form resembles someone who has succumbed to power in this world. Yet, this being from the rift has not yet fallen. He gazes at you with deep eyes and speaks. "Through this rift, I glimpsed my future... and saw that what I accepted was not power but a catalyst for an endless descent. As such, I wish to end this path here." The young prince launches an orb shaped like an eye, ready to accompany you on your journey.

The eye-like magic orb ascends in silence, casting its light upon the path ahead. The prince says,
"I shall join you and lend you my knowledge...for my demise."

You encounter an entity inside the rift of a different dimension. She weeps in silence, clutching a doll tightly in her arms. Once hailed as the empire's greatest swordswoman, she now carries the weight of failure. She failed to protect her sibling. With great effort, she suppresses sorrow and molds it into fury. "The blood price must be paid for the sake of my ruined world," says the avenger as she hands you a dagger, its blades still slick with fresh blood. "Take it. I shall follow you after spilling blood."
As you take her dagger, she turns, striding in the opposite direction. Her eyes burn with resolve.
The Hero and the Dark Lord

You encounter an entity inside the rift of a different dimension. Once a hero, the Dark Lord completed her world in another rift. However, her world crumbled within the Dimensional Rift, drowning her in sorrow once again. The once-hero speaks. "Do you seek my strength? Then prove that you have the courage to face it." The hero, who was once the Dark Lord, prepares to grant you her strength.

The great power of the world flows into you.
"Go."
With that final word, she vanishes...

Remember. Where my sword reaches, we shall prosper under the protection of the Empire and make history. Disobey. Where my sword reaches, you shall witness the indomitable power of the Empire and the terror it brings.

The season will be ending soon.
After the season ends, your Rift score will not be registered to the Ranking.
Please be aware to avoid any inconvenience.
※ If you clear Floor 9 or above, a score of 600,000 or above will be reflected in the Ranking.
※ If the season changes while you are playing, its record will not be reflected in the Ranking.
※ It may take up to 10 minutes for the Ranking to be listed.
Rewards will be provided based on the Ranking at the end of the season.
During a season, you can activate Challenge Mode after you clear Rift Upgrade Phase 15.
Upon activating Challenge Mode, Floors 10-15 will be added in the Dimensional Rift.
In Challenge Mode, Rift Upgrade Phase 15 will be applied, and additional buffs will be applied to monsters on Floors 10 and above.
Rift Seasonal buffs are also applied in Challenge Mode.
The Challenge Mode does not affect clear rewards.
If the season ends or changes while you are playing Challenge Mode, your gameplay will not be registered to the Ranking upon clearing the Dimensional Rift.
You will not receive rewards such as Silver or HP Recovery after battle in Floors 10-15.
Seasonal Effects will be activated in Phase 16 (Challenge Mode) after you clear Rift Upgrade Phase 15.

Two secondary stats are granted to Unique Accessories, and one to Rare and Normal Accessories.
The values of secondary stats are determined by the tier of each secondary stat.
The tiers of the secondary stats range from SS (highest) to D (lowest).
Secondary stats of the same tier may have different effect values.
Every secondary stat tier has predetermined points, and the sum of the points cannot exceed 30.
The points of each secondary stat tier are as follows. SS: 22.5 - 26 S: 18.5 - 22 A: 13.5 - 18 B: 8.5 - 13 C: 4.5 - 8 D: 1 - 4
When an Accessory reaches level 4/8/12/16/20 through upgrades, its secondary stats are also upgraded. The tiers of the secondary stats do not change with upgrades.
Please refer to the following link for details.
The tiers of the Accessory's secondary stats are determined upon purchasing the package.

Guest accounts can't play Strife Battlefield. Please proceed with account synchronization.
Secondary stats can be changed within the effects of the same Altar.

Knights of the Holy Church undergo a consecration ritual, engraving their unwavering faith into their armor. Gidnil completed this rite on his gauntlets, Tryggvahrn, instilling them with his convictions, his cold, unshakable will, and his firm resolve to punish all who stand against him.
Instead of using <Azure Dragon Slash> on the third time, uses <Thunder Dragon Slash> that is guaranteed to deal 27 times the damage of Horizontal Dragon Edge to a single target
Now, you can participate in the battle of the new chapter <color=#ffc13d>Bandit Invasion</color>.

Many perils and hardships await your journey, but I hope you will defeat your enemies and guard your castle with powerful heroes.
<color=#ffc13d>Good luck.</color>
Receive Strife Battlefield Season 62 Rank Rewards!
Receive Alliance Raid Season 62 Rank Rewards!
Receive Dimensional Rift Season 62 Rank Rewards!
O ancient book... whisper more knowledge and strength to me. O ancient book… For them, I would gladly surrender a life. But of course, I never said it would be mine.
Embers can be expanded up to a maximum of 25.
Embers can be expanded once each time the Castle level increases by 1.
The Embers used to upgrade the Altars can be retrieved and relocated freely using the Retrieve Ember button.
The Altars and Embers unlock at Castle level 5.
Temporarily recruited heroes cannot be leveled up.
You cannot purchase skins for temporarily recruited heroes.
You cannot change skins for temporarily recruited heroes.
The Vanguard hero has been set.
The Vanguard hero has been removed.

What is a Vanguard hero? It is a feature where only the Vanguard hero appears when the summon count is below a certain threshold after the game starts. You can designate up to 1 Vanguard hero per Barracks slot. The applicable content and summon counts for the Vanguard hero are as follows.
<color=#ffd264>Single-player content: Applied to the first 8 hero summons</color> Gate - Battle content Invasion, Expedition, other Event modes
<color=#ffd264>PVP and ranking content: Applied to the first 3 hero summons</color> Arena and Strife Battlefield Alliance Raid

An Altar that increases the efficiency of raising the tier of heroes.
Recommended: General

An Altar that helps you obtain high-tier equipment and pursue various growth opportunities.
Recommended: Invasion, Alliance Raid

An Altar that enhances battle endurance with HP Drain and Mighty Block.
Recommended: Strife Battlefield

An Altar that enhances survivability with DEF, HP, and reflect damage.
Recommended: Strife Battlefield

An Altar that recovers MP quickly to cast skills more frequently.
Recommended: Strife Battlefield

An Altar that increases the supply of Silver to facilitate hero summoning and shop usage.
Recommended: Invasion, Arena
+{0}% Attack Speed for the Vanguard hero at the beginning of the battle in Invasion and Expedition (no effect if there is no Vanguard hero)
Refund of Altar Ember Expansion Cost
This is a refund of the Gold spent on expanding Ember at the Altars.

Greetings, King of the Castle. It's been a while. <color=#FFC13D>I am Knight Commander Aslyn.</color>
I would like to explain about the <color=#ffc13d>Vanguard hero</color> in the Barracks.

<color=#ffc13d>Vanguard hero</color> is one of the elements that can be strategically utilized in King God Castle.
After you start an Invasion or Expedition, when summoning heroes 8 times or less, <color=#ffc13d>only the Vanguard hero is summoned.</color>
By utilizing this, you can designate a <color=#ffc13d>Vanguard hero</color> to start the battle with an advantage.
Now, let's designate a <color=#ffc13d>Vanguard hero</color>. Please press the <color=#ffc13d>Designate Vanguard</color> button.
Please designate one of the deployed heroes as a <color=#ffc13d>Vanguard hero</color>.

Well done.
Only <color=#ffc13d>one Vanguard hero can be designated</color>, and you may change to another hero or <color=#ffc13d>choose not to designate a Vanguard hero.</color>

Additionally, if you play with<color=#ffc13d>15 points of Altar of Greed</color>, you can <color=#ffc13d>summon heroes 8 times with the initial Silver</color>, allowing you to quickly make use of the strategy.
<color=#FFC13D>I hope you defend the castle successfully by strategically using the Vanguard hero. Good luck.</color>

Greetings, King of the Castle. I am <color=#FFC13D>Knight Commander Aslyn</color>.
Congratulations on your ascension to the Castellan.

King God Castle is a precarious castle frequently besieged by monster invasions. Goblins are trying to breach the castle gate as we speak.
Please, let me explain how to <color=#FFC13D>navigate the battle</color> through this round and assist you in defending King God Castle excellently.
You obtained a piece of <color=#f90>equipment</color>! <color=#FFC13D>Drag the equipment and equip it on a hero.</color>
<color=#FFC13D>Initiate the battle when you are ready.</color>

Unfortunately, we lost the battle.
One of our <color=#ff3333>Banners has been lost</color>.
If we lose <color=#ff3333>3 Banners</color>, we will have to retreat to the gate.

When we lose a battle, we get to face the enemies once again.
Even when we are <color=#ffc13d>defeated</color>, we will be granted a <color=#ffc13d>small amount of Silver</color> so that we can reinforce our Troop.

We summoned 2 more of the same hero. The Goddess of Fortune smiles upon us!
<color=#FFC13D>Merge heroes to reach Tier 3</color> <color=#bbb>(Drag or double-tap to merge!)</color>
Now, Mel is stronger than before!

When a hero reaches <color=#FFC13D>Tier 3, 5, and 7, their skills will be enhanced.</color>
You can <color=#FFC13D>click the skill area</color>to see the skill range.
Your Most Highness, please initiate the battle with the enhanced hero.
We got some Tier 2 equipment now.

Equipment can be upgraded in the same way as heroes to reach higher tiers.
<color=#FFC13D>Go ahead and merge them to upgrade the equipment to Tier 3.</color>
At Tier 3, <color=#FFC13D>special effects</color> are added to the equipment.
<color=#FFC13D>Please tap the button</color> to check the result briefing from the last battle.
In <color=#FFC13D>Settings</color>, you can choose to include heroes assigned to the battlefield for the auto-combining function.
I'm here to guide you to <color=#FFC13D>enhance your heroes and initiate battles</color>.
Drag and deploy <color=#FFC13D>6 heroes</color> for the next battle. <color=#ddd><size=19>(Check out more info by tapping the heroes.)</size></color>
<color=#FFC13D>You can initiate the battle from the Gate tab.</color> We must defend our castle against the Goblins right now.
<color=#FFC13D>You can begin the battle with the prepared heroes by tapping the Battle button.</color>
<color=#FFC13D>May you lead us to victory with excellent command!</color>
Congratulations! You have successfully defended against the first invasion! It seems you are adapting well to the battlefield.
You can play the <color=#FFC13D>next level</color> after successfully defending a Chapter.
You can also earn <color=#FFC13D>Invasion rewards</color> when you clear an Invasion Chapter for the first time.
Please claim the rewards. Some rewards cannot be used immediately, but they are very valuable, so please keep them safe.
You can earn even more <color=#FFC13D>rewards</color> by playing <color=#FFC13D>higher levels</color>.

You can play the next Chapter once you clear the Normal level.
<color=#FFC13D>Please protect the castle from various monster invasions!</color>
Goblins are no match for you now! Congratulations.
You can play the <color=#FFC13D>next Chapter</color> after clearing a certain <color=#FFC13D>level</color>.

Many enemies will continue to invade King God Castle.
<color=#FFC13D>Please protect the castle from various monster invasions!</color>

Long time no see, King of the Castle.
Now we are ready to join <color=#FFC13D><Arena></color>, the battleground for castellans.

You must create a <color=#FFC13D><Troop></color> of heroes to join the Arena.
You can set up your own Troop through <color=#FFC13D><Arena Formation></color>.
King of the Castle, I'm here to deliver urgent news. We have enemies <color=#ffc13d>corrupted</color> by mysterious power marching toward our castle.
When defending against <color=#FFC13D>corrupted</color> monsters, you can play all levels of a Chapter from the start.
I've got a <color=#ffc13d>Relic Piece</color> with me. Please <color=#ffc13d>craft a Relic</color> with this.

This can also be checked in the Relic info window,
and each Relic option <color=#ffc13d>grants a different value depending on its phase.</color>
Additionally, when reaching King God Tier, you can also proceed with <color=#ffc13d>forging</color> to change the Relic options.

There are <color=#ffc13d>various types of Relics</color> you can acquire in King God Castle.
<color=#ffc13d>Please use the Relics to your strategic advantage to protect the castle from powerful enemies</color>.
Well done! Heroes can be changed in the Barracks tab <color=#ffc13d>anytime.</color>

We meet again, King of the Castle. I am <color=#FFC13D>Knight Commander Aslyn</color>.
This time, I will show you how to <color=#FFC13D>initiate battles against enemy invasions</color>.
<color=#FFC13D>You can initiate the battle from the Gate tab.</color> We must defend our castle against the Goblins right now.
<color=#FFC13D>You can begin the battle with the prepared heroes by tapping the Battle button.</color>
<color=#FFC13D>May you lead us to victory with excellent command!</color>

King of the Castle, to fight against the strengthening monsters, you must utilize the power of the Altars.
This time, I will show you how to <color=#FFC13D>upgrade the Altars</color> to effectively stop the monsters.
At the Altar, you can gain <color=#FFC13D>beneficial effects for battles by using the Altar Embers</color> given to you.
The Altar Ember can be expanded once each time the Castle level increases by 1. <color=#FFC13D>Try expanding the Ember.</color>
Use the expanded Embers to <color=#FFC13D>grant them to the Altar of Greed</color>. (Tap the Altar for more details.)
You can always <color=#FFC13D>retrieve and grant Embers</color> at the Altars according to your strategy.
The effects of the Altar of Greed, empowered by the Embers, will now be applied to the battlefield. <color=#FFC13D>Utilize the power of the Altars to successfully defend the castle!</color>
Greetings, King of the Castle. The time has come for you to gain the <color=#ffc13d>power of new heroes</color> to face stronger monsters.
You can further strengthen a hero by selecting them in the Barracks. As they level up, battles will become much easier. Please empower the heroes!

Would you like to use the Altars in the Barracks? They can provide you with power that greatly aids in battle. As you expand the Embers, the Altars also become stronger, making your journey ahead more secure.

The Altar Ember can be expanded once each time the Castle level increases. It can be expanded up to a maximum of 25, so take your time to upgrade it. As the Ember grows, the Altars will shine more beautifully.
You can retrieve and grant the Altar Ember at any time. Feel free to make use of it.
In the Blacksmith of the Barracks, you can craft Relics that provide significant strength in battle. Properly assigning the completed Relics will give you a great advantage in battle!

Have you tried opening the Relic Chest in the summoning tab? They are filled with materials necessary for crafting Relics. If you have gathered the materials, try crafting a wonderful Relic at the Blacksmith!
Have you visited the Dominion? Constructing buildings in the Dominion can make your heroes stronger.

If you designate a Vanguard hero in the Barracks, that hero will appear first in the first 8 summons after the game starts. Make sure to set it if you want to summon the hero you want quickly. And... since I am a supporter, please don't send me as a Vanguard!
Legacies are special equipment that awaken the true power of heroes. If you equip a hero with a Legacy, they can exert much more powerful strength in battle.
Legacies can be enhanced. By enhancing or combining the same Legacy, you will be granted more power.
Accessories are precious equipment that draw out the potential of heroes. However, you must clear 'Corruption Invasion II' to obtain them, so prepare well and take on the challenge.
View Bardrey's Advice Again in the Lobby
You have to be at least Level 12 to join Arena
+10% CRIT Chance if an ally deals skill damage to the target of <Flower Mist> (max 3 stacks)
+30% skill damage taken by the target of <Flower Mist> (cannot be stacked)

Unlike her sister Prophetess Luminesera who is actively engaging in public affairs, Ternev, tired of her selfish kin after the Elven Civil War, lives alone in the deep, dark forest to create her own forest.
+50% skill amplification to allies for the skill duration if the target of <Flower Mist> is the same as the one linked before the battle started (cannot be stacked)
When the target linked to the highest-tier Ternev before the battle starts is killed, all allies become invincible for 1/1.5/2/3 sec
Ternev the Princess of Eternal Forest
Ternev quietly helped the elves of the Eternal Forest with a deeper compassion and warmer heart than anyone. However, as the Elven Civil War began, many things started to change.
Tending to her garden filled with dark flowers
Long ago, after the Elven Civil War, she cut ties with everyone and retreated into the deep forest
Vermule is a flower that only grows in the deep forest and has the unique property of absorbing nearby sounds. Ternev, who dislikes noise, always carries Vermule with her.

After preparing an attack, deals {Damage} damage to targets within <color=#8DFFFF>1x1</color> range, then slows them by {Slow}% for {Time} sec.

After preparing an attack, creates a Fire Pillar {MaxTargetCount} time(s), dealing {Damage} damage to targets within {SplashRangeX}{X}{SplashRangeY} range centered on a random enemy. The center of the Fire Pillar creates flames that deal {218105@FireTileDamage} damage every <color=#FFD247>0.25</color> sec for {218105@TickAttackTime} sec. Whenever a target takes flame damage, the final damage from flames increases by <color=#FFD247>100%</color>. This can stack up to 19 times, increasing the final damage up to <color=#FFD247>2,000%</color>. This effect can be removed by moving or teleporting 3 blocks or more.

Grants the Empire's Shield effect to all allies within {SplashRangeX}{X}{SplashRangeY} range for {Time} sec. Units with the Empire's Shield effect have their damage taken from enemies outside the <color=#8DFFFF>3X3</color> range reduced by {TotalTakeDamagePerToTargetNotIf}%.

Charges toward the target, dealing {Damage} damage to enemies in a straight line and stunning them for {StunTime} seconds. At the beginning of the battle, grants the <Empire's Charge> effect to all allies within {218300@SplashRangeX}{X}{218300@SplashRangeY} range. Allies with the <Empire's Charge> effect are immune to crowd control, have their Movement Speed increased by {218300@MoveSpeedPer}%, and their damage increased by {218300@NextAttackOrSkillDamagePer}%. This effect is removed when they deal damage to an enemy.

Immune to crowd control and freeze. Cannot heal or restore Protection. Fires a Giant Arrow every {ChannelingTime} sec. Enemies in a straight line within <color=#8DFFFF>{21845@SplashRangeX}</color> horizontal block(s) in front take {21845@Damage} damage. Enemies in the central range have all Mighty/Physical/Spell Blocks destroyed, and damage taken from the Giant Arrow is increased by {21845@DamagePerOnExtraRange}%. If damaged by a hero at the back of the battlefield, consumes HP equal to <color=#FFD247>1,000%</color> of the damage taken. Upon destruction, summons one Imperial Soldier.

Deals {Damage} damage to all enemies within {SplashRangeX}{x}{SplashRangeY} range centered on the target, then creates flames of {21855@SplashRangeX}{X}{21855@SplashRangeY} range that deal {21855@FireTileDamage} damage every <color=#FFD247>0.25</color> sec for {21855@TickAttackTime} sec. Whenever a target takes flame damage, the final damage from flames increases by <color=#FFD247>100%</color>. This can stack up to 19 times, increasing the final damage up to <color=#FFD247>2,000%</color>. This effect can be removed by moving or teleporting 3 blocks or more.
Defeat all Imperial Warriors while not under the <Empire's Shield> effect
Defeat the last remaining ballista with a hero at the back of the battlefield
Defeat all elites with a hero without Protection

The Trading Post's items are determined based on the <color=#ffd264>Trading Post Level</color>. Items at Trading Post Level 4 or below <color=#ffd264>reset every week</color>, and items at Trading Post Level 5 or above <color=#ffd264>reset every two weeks</color>.

Select a hero, roll the dice, and play King God Dice!
Each hero has unique effects, and by rolling the dice, you can encounter various rewards and events.
Each time you reach or pass the starting point and complete a lap, the tiles change randomly, and you can obtain additional rewards based on the number of laps completed.
If the dice land on a double, you can roll again.
<color=#f33>Dice count -1</color>, and you move backward by the rolled value.
If you land on a non-item tile, you move to the nearest item tile or the starting point.
Occasionally, you get a chance to roll again!
When you arrive or pass, all spaces are reset.
You have arrived at the starting point!

You have arrived at the starting point and completed a lap!
All tiles are reset, and the hero returns to the starting point!
You can move to the desired location.

You have arrived at Teleport!
Please select a tile to move to!
(All effects that were activated immediately are canceled.)

The current hero moves to the starting point.
(All effects that were activated immediately are canceled.)

The hero emerges from a different exit.
(All effects that were activated immediately are canceled.)
You roll 1 additional die on the next dice you roll yourself.
The next dice you roll yourself is guaranteed to be a double.
You roll 1 die on the next dice you roll yourself and move by x3.

You are pushed back 5 spaces.
(All effects that were activated immediately are canceled.)
-3 from the next dice you roll yourself. (Does not decrease below 1.)

You are considered as having arrived at the starting point, and all tiles are reset!
(All effects that were activated immediately are canceled.)
When you roll the next dice yourself and move, you also obtain the items on both sides.

Different abilities are activated depending on the current hero!
After rolling two dice that always land on doubles, roll again!
(All effects that were activated immediately are canceled.)

Different abilities are activated depending on the current hero!
Roll 1 die and move backward by that amount!
(All effects that were activated immediately are canceled.)

Different abilities are activated depending on the current hero!
Move to the nearest item tile or the starting point!
(All effects that were activated immediately are canceled.)

Different abilities are activated depending on the current hero!
After rolling two dice, roll again!
(All effects that were activated immediately are canceled.)
Rewards are provided based on the number of times you have reached the starting point!
Are you sure you want to try again? The current configured Raid Troop will be reset.
You can obtain Supplies once a day.
A place where you can obtain Supplies once a day. If you level up the building, you can obtain more Supplies.
The symbolic flag of the investigation team. It is needed to start special investigations from Dominion's investigation team.
Defeat all enemies with the damage of a hero within 2-block range
Clear the round without any heroes being killed (excluding summoned creatures)
Clear the round with a Tier 5 or higher Courage-class hero from the North region in the battlefield

1 Corruption Token converts to 5 Alchemy Points.
Corruption Tokens are used in units of 20, and each Alchemy attempt can be converted to a maximum of 10,000 Alchemy Points.

Secondary stats are unlocked one line at a time as the tier increases.
Main stats affect all heroes, while secondary stats only affect the hero in the spot marked with the stat icon.
The fewer the number of spots with effects, the higher the secondary stat's value. A fixed value is applied to each type of stat.
You must select all Altar effects to save.
The maximum levels of the Altar effects are determined based on the Rift Equipment levels.

Would you like to start forging?
Equip statistics are collected once a day based on the users' hero information.
Only the information of heroes at level 20 or higher equipped with both a Legacy and all 5 Accessories will be collected.
Allow me to explain the Guaranteed Forge system.
Guaranteed Forge is a forging method where you can set a Relic option of your choice to the maximum.
It requires Blacksmith's Tokens, which can be obtained through Weekly Missions and more.
Select a Relic to perform Guaranteed Forge.
After selecting a Relic, select an option to change.
I will forge the Relic option to ATK.
After selecting the Relic option you want to forge, you must select a position to assign it.
I will assign the Relic option to the first position.
After selecting the position, you can use Blacksmith's Tokens to confirm the forging results.
A token only a true blacksmith can appraise. It allows you to unlock your Relic's full potential.

Obtain tokens through the Temple of Challenge. You receive bonus tokens as you go deeper underground.
The Temple of Challenge is a Ranking mode available during the first half of the season.
You must use one formation for all battles.
Even if you do not win normal battles, you can still challenge the final boss battle at the Gate of Proof.
Ranking is based on the deepest floor reached during the period and the highest damage dealt to the boss.
Before the battle starts, you can change the floor you want to challenge with the difficulty button.
Ranking rewards are given at the end of the season.
The Temple of Challenge is based on battles from the story. If it is hard to clear, finishing the story first may help.
Not all Heroes have been deployed yet. Some trials cannot be won unless all Heroes are deployed. Do you want to start the game anyway?
Boss {0} uses a Chain Skill after <color=#FFD247>{1}</color> Basic Attacks.
Chain Skills are used in the set order.

If the activation condition for a Condition Skill is met before a Chain Skill is used, the boss delays the Chain Skill and uses the Condition Skill. After using all skills, it defeats all enemies and ends the battle.
Dimensional Equipment available after Floor {0} in the Temple of Challenge
You can change the difficulty by setting the floor of the Temple of Challenge.
When you challenge deeper floors, enemy HP, ATK, and Spell Power increase, but you can also use equipment to fight them.
Legacy can be used on Floors 1~5.
Legacy and Accessories can be used on Floors 6~10.
From Floor 11 onward, Legacy, Accessories, and Dimensional Equipment can be used.
The starting floor setting is selected automatically based on unlocked content.
Floors 1~11 open at the start of the season, and later floors open after clearing the previous floor.

Rewards are given based on your Ranking when the first half of the season ends. To be listed in the Top 100, you must have a clear record of Floor 11 or higher.

Not all phantoms have Heroes yet. Start the game anyway?

You cannot retreat from this Battle.
A shabby wagon moves along the forest road. The girl, who had dozed off for a moment, wakes up at the loud noise.
Wow~ What a nice view! I didn't know there was a place like this in the South.
It's totally different from what I saw on the map!
I guess the bugs weren't on the map, huh?
This too... should be a song! “Romantic forest, but lots of bugs.” Note that down.
Oh, you're awake? Sorry. Was I a little... too loud?
Nice to meet you! I'm Bardrey, a traveler chasing myths and legends!
Aha! Mel... Mel... That's a pretty name!
If you don't want to say, you don't have to.
Actually, I snuck out from home. Hehe.
I'm the type who feels trapped staying at home. So this time, I really decided to leave.
Aha, if we go a little farther this way, Frontier Village should appear.
Huh? What's wrong? Wagons always shake a little!
Could you be a hero from legend?!
Ah... if it makes you uncomfortable, you don't have to tell me...
Miss, it's a forest road from here. It's dangerous to go alone.
What if Goblins show up again like before?
Of course, with your skill, I guess there won't be a problem...
If I stay with you, it will only be more dangerous.
With uneasy eyes, the girl who had bravely fought the Goblins just moments ago disappears down the forest road.
Did I take care of all the nearby Goblins?
I've never seen so many Goblins before.
Why do monsters keep coming after me?
Am I really cursed after all?
When I reach the Central Kingdom, I'll learn everything.
Use the <color=#ff8800>bottom directional pad</color> to move.
If you find anything strange while moving, press the <color=#ff8800>Interact button</color> to check it.
If you want to hear me again, press the <color=#ff8800>Replay Dialogue</color> button at the top left.
What? This looks like the place I just passed...
No, that can't be. The path seems more confusing than I thought.
How many more do I have to take down?
Ugh...! Was I hurt in that last Battle?
How much farther do I have to go…?
…Just as I thought. It was all because of you, Mel.
…… Pull yourself together. This is all just an illusion.
Home… I want to go home.
In the end, even Grandpa... because of you…
It's all because of me… It's all because of me..
Because of me, the village, the villagers, Grandpa, everything…!
Was there a path like this here? I'm sure there wasn't one a moment ago...?
A cabin...? So someone once lived in this forest.
It's full of dust inside, and it looks like it could collapse at any moment.
Do I really need to go in?
Maybe there's something that could help in battle?
There's nothing here but dust and an old bed.
And there's a back door too? Could there be something in the backyard?
There could be a hidden weapon in the backyard...
I should check the backyard too.
What is this? It looks very old, but the detailed pattern is still intact.
Sadly, it doesn't look like there's anything else that could help in battle.
If I don't pull myself together, I feel like I'm going to collapse…
I should at least wash my face first.
A keepsake from her parents. A strange metal necklace shaped like a star, with small engraved marks.
I need to take the necklace.
Uuh… I followed her because I was worried, but…
There are so many trees, and I don't even know where Mel went…
Maybe I should just go back?
Mel said she would go alone, but she clearly looked nervous.
And I don't know why, but I feel like if I follow Mel, an amazing story will begin~!
I need to be careful not to go that way.
It looks like there's a signpost, but the Goblins are blocking the way.
Ah! Goblins have always been sensitive to sound...
If I make noise in the right spot, I might be able to lure the Goblins away.
I need to find a good spot to make noise.
Uuh… If I go this way, the Goblins will catch me.
The Goblins will come running right away, so I need to hide..!
I think I can go check the signpost now.
Phew… I think I managed to lose them somehow.
But the Goblins are still blocking the signpost.
Let's try to get the Goblins' attention again.
If I just follow the signpost, I won't get lost, right?
Huh? I think I'm back in the same place...
Without the signpost, I don't know where to go.
I should look around and see if there's a signpost somewhere.
Hmm… Did I read the signpost wrong?
This time, I need to watch the signpost carefully as I go.
If I go this way, I'll run into the Goblins.
I need to find a place to hide nearby.
What a nice view~! This is the perfect place to play the lute, isn't it?
Maybe I should play a little?
No, don't get distracted. I should find Mel first.
Should I try going right first?
Which way was I supposed to go again?
Good thing I drew a map. I should check my bag.
Phew, I barely made it out.
… What do I do? She's burning up.
Oh, right! There should be a potion in my bag.
What do I do? It looks like one basic potion isn't enough.
There's no sign her fever is going down.
And the wound on her leg isn't healing at all.
Since we're in a forest, there should be some herbs around here.
Mel, wait a little longer. I'll heal you…!
Ugh… I don't want to get lost again…!
I need to help Mel first!
This isn't the way to the village.
If I go too far, something might happen to Mel.
For now, let's look for herbs as close by as possible.
It looks exactly like the one in the book!
It's not a poisonous plant that looks like yarrow... right?
There are too many wounds on her leg. Two won't be enough.
Phew... I'm glad the Goblin is gone.
I need to hurry and bring this to Mel!
What is this…? It looks like a note.
…sen One? The front is torn off, so I can't really tell, but it feels like it was written pretty recently.
Could the other half be somewhere...?
I'll go get some herbs right away…!
It was a little loud, right?
But why are you here...? This isn't a hallucination, right?
How could I leave you behind when it takes you all day to use one skill!!?
Anyway, I don't think your wounds have fully healed yet.
I think we should go to Frontier Village and rest first.
Ugh…! There are a lot of Goblins nearby.
Mel, this time I'll help you!
I guess I'm still not fully recovered...
Well... because there really is a sound!
It sounds like someone is asking for help... Let's look for them.
The sun will set soon... Will we be okay?
If someone needs help, I can't turn away.
I don't think I hear anything from this direction.
Yeah. We shouldn't go this way.
I still haven't saved everyone in danger.
I have to go save the villagers.
Ugh… The villagers were caught by Goblins and dragged up the road ahead.
I barely escaped, but then I got caught...
Please save the villagers who were taken...!
I really want to help, but...
If you keep fighting, your wounds might open up again.
Just like you saved me, Bardrey, I'll save the villagers too.
I knew you'd say that, Mel.
A legendary heroine never turns away from others!
The villagers are being held there!
And there's even a scary-looking monster...
Mel! That thing said your name!
It must know you. Did you even have Goblin friends?
Mel, look at this. That Goblin dropped a note while it was running away.
I think this fits perfectly with the note I found while looking for herbs. Want to try putting them together?
This looks like a person, and this is a sword... a sword? It looks like a shining sword.
Mel. This note... I think the Goblins are after you!
I always thought monsters appeared around me because I was born this way.
But I never thought they were targeting me on purpose… why?
But the note is torn in half, so I can't tell for sure.
I never thought a hero would suddenly appear like this… Thanks to you, we all survived!!
No. I only did what I had to do.
And without her, it would have been hard for me too.
Thanks to you, no one is.
Mom~ Can we go home now?
We want to repay you for saving us.
Please let us treat you to a meal at the village Inn. Come to our village.
(If I go to the village, the villagers might be in danger again.)
Let's hurry, Mel! I have so many songs to sing about what happened today!
Thank you so much for helping us.
It's nothing. I'm just glad everyone is safe.
I prepared this in case it helps on your journey.
Thank you. We'll enjoy the meal.
It's been a long time since I had warm food.
Thank you again. Where are you going now?
I'm planning to leave for the Central Kingdom.
The Central Kingdom... It will be a hard journey.
Lately, they say groups of bandits have been showing up often, so you should be careful.
Bardrey, does the food taste good?
Yeah! It's not as good as what I usually eat, but adventures need this kind of charm too!
(How good must the food she usually eats be?)
Thank you. Then we'll be on our way.
You two, where are you headed?
We're heading to the Central Kingdom.
Then you'll have to pass through the Empire.
Could you deliver this for me?
It's a letter for a lord of the South Empire.
It would help me a lot if you took it.
A lord? Oh... this suddenly got serious.
This is so exciting! Right, Mel?
Haha. Don't worry. You only need to deliver it.
I'm sure they'll give you a nice reward too.
If you come with me, you'll keep facing danger.
Even so, do you still really want to follow me?
Of course! How could I resist something this exciting!
Target found. That's the one for sure.
Stick to the plan. I'll go report this.
Before defeating the Goblins, let's check the items I have.
Tap <color=#ff8800>Bag</color> to see items that will help in Battle.
After checking the Bag, let's review this <color=#ff8800>Battle Objective</color> one more time.
In this Battle, you only need Victory, but depending on the situation, there may also be <color=#ff8800>special Victory conditions</color>...
If the Battle is too hard, you can also light the <color=#ff8800>Lamp</color> to get a <color=#ff8800>Hint</color>.
If you're ready, let's start the Battle.
If you want to hear me again, tap the <color=#ff8800>Review Dialogue</color> button in the top left.
Why are there so many monsters...?
I need to stay calm. Grandpa... already...
I won't make the same mistake again.
There should be a bow nearby. It was dropped while fighting the Goblins.
Using that bow should help a little.
I said I'd help with confidence... but how are we supposed to beat that monster?
Right, Goblins are sensitive to sound, so maybe...
Welcome, challenger. I am <color=#ff8800>Amed</color>, the keeper of the Temple of Challenge.
This temple is no ordinary temple. The <color=#ff8800>memories of the Heroes</color> who once protected the world dwell here and will put you to the test.
To overcome these trials, you will need not only Combat Power, but also the past Heroes' <color=#ff8800>Strat</color> and <color=#ff8800>wit</color>.
In each room of the temple, you can challenge a trial. If you win, you can Obtain <color=#ff8800>rewards that will be a great help</color> in Battles against the strong enemies ahead.
You do not need to clear every trial. If you think the enemy is too strong, <color=#ff8800>taking a detour is also part of Strat</color>.
Use your strategic judgment to reach the <color=#ff8800>deepest part of the Temple of Challenge</color>.
You can press the <color=#ff8800>Review Dialogue</color> button in the top left to check my advice again.
If you challenge the monsters ahead, you can face the <color=#ff8800>first trial</color>.
Or, <color=#ff8800>avoiding Battle</color> can also be a strategy.
Aim to reach the <color=#ff8800>deepest part of the Temple of Challenge</color> with strategic judgment.
Find the Source of the Sound
Rescue the Villagers Captured by Goblins
Challenge the Boss at the Gate of Proof
Equip Mel with the God Sword below, then start the Battle.
Use easy-to-defeat enemies to fill Mel's MP.
Place Mel as far from the Goblin Bombardier as possible to reduce the time she is under attack.
Try to spread out the Goblin Rider's attacks.
Place Mel and Bardrey so each faces a Goblin Fighter, and keep the damage low until Mel uses the Holy Sword.
Have Bardrey play the lute quickly. Be careful not to let the villagers get caught in Chau's attack.
A very old seal. It looks like the pattern carved on the hilt of Mel's sword.
A note meant to harm someone
A very old seal. Its use is unknown.
A note with an unknown drawing.
It bears the same pattern as the hilt of the sword Village Chief Sencrad gave Mel to take to the Central Kingdom. Why is a seal from the Central Kingdom lying in a remote forest in the South?

A precious keepsake from her mother that helps Mel imagine at least a little of what memories with her parents might have been like. When Mel was still a baby, before she could even form memories of them, her parents had to part with her, leaving only this necklace behind. She cannot remember her parents, but the strange warmth she feels when holding the necklace gives Mel the hope to keep moving forward every day.

The shining sword and the blonde girl drawn on the note seem to represent Mel. It is unknown who made this note or why it was given to the Goblins. One thing is certain: someone ordered the monsters to attack Mel.
A torn note that cannot be read
A torn note that cannot be read
A malicious signpost. It has arrows pointing right, left, up, down, and down.
A herb that is hard to handle. It is sharp and can cut you.
A letter Sencrad gave Mel with his last words. Mel, take this letter and go to a person named Aslin in the Central Kingdom.
